Name: Cognifyz Technologies
Description:
Cognifyz Technologies is a technology company that provides software solutions for businesses. The company offers a range of products and services, including artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), and data analytics tools.

One of the main offerings of Cognifyz Technologies is their AI-powered chatbot platform, which can be integrated with various communication channels such as websites, social media, and messaging apps. The chatbot platform allows businesses to automate their customer support and engagement, reduce response time, and improve customer satisfaction.

Cognifyz Technologies also provides ML-based solutions for predictive analytics, fraud detection, and recommendation engines. These tools help businesses to analyze large amounts of data and make data-driven decisions in real-time.

Description:
MANTECH is more than a technology company. We are a company dedicated to service, and we consider our work a part of the public trust. The people of MANTECH are privileged to work for the security of the United States, the welfare of our service members and veterans, the protection of our communities, and the cause of better health care.

We have served the nation for more than 57 years, and in that time we have continually changed and grown to provide the technology that government needs to meet new challenges. We seek people with the same strong ethic of service, creativity, energy, and dedication to serving our country.

We are comprised of more than 9,800 talented employees around the world. Nearly 40% of our employees are veterans. Many others come from the Intelligence Community, Homeland Security and federal civilian agencies. We understand our customers’ challenges because we know their world firsthand.

When Federal managers and military leaders face tough challenges in cyber, data collection & analysis, enterprise IT or systems and software engineering, they turn to MANTECH to get the job done right. These professionals trust MANTECH and stay with us for years because we understand their needs and tackle their most complex challenges head on. They know that reaching their goal is our ultimate objective.

Name: Alphaliner
Description:
Stay a step ahead of developments in container shipping with Alphaliner products.

Alphaliner customer base includes all the major container shipping operators, the leading shipbrokers and owners of container tonnage, as well as banks, port authorities, terminal operators, logistics companies and shippers.
 
Alphaliner provides essential facts and figures to help liner shipping executives in their decisions. It is also the ideal tool for marketing research teams, competition analysts, fleet managers and shipbrokers.
 
Alphaliner saves precious time in providing on a plate a huge quantity of information.

Some database figures:

◆  10,000 existing ships & orders detailed
◆  60,000 fixture records
◆    4,500 ship sales records
◆    2,000 service strings detailed
◆  20,000 archived news
◆    3,500 container ports
◆  10,000 proprietary polygons (ports, terminals, berths)

Alphaliner products:

◆  Online interactive solution offering the most exhaustive & up-to-date containership register & services directory.

         -   Commercial histories of ships, with latest fixtures, sales & ordering prices.
         -   Ports & Terminals module.
         -   AIS features & analytical tools embedded all through the online solutions.
         -   Operators’ profiles, Liner Services descriptions, ships deployed (owned & chartered)
         -   Powerful Vessel & data manager

◆  Weekly Newsletter summing up salient developments, corporate news, financial results, new lines, new ships etc.
◆  Monthly Monitor offering detailed statistics and facts on the world containership fleet & market figures
◆  Customized data extracts

Name: Evolve Data
Description:
Nosso foco é entender o negócio por trás dos números e usar dados como alavanca real de eficiência, crescimento e decisão estratégica.

Atuamos como parceiros de negócio orientados por dados, onde mergulhamos nas rotinas, processos e metas da empresa para identificar onde o uso inteligente de dados pode gerar impacto direto em tempo, custo e lucro.

Mapeamos gargalos em processos, planilhas e fluxos de informação, revelando onde sua operação está perdendo performance e quais ajustes podem gerar resultados imediatos.

Com base nisso, desenhamos uma estratégia personalizada que combina:

• Análises e automações sob medida, alinhadas aos objetivos estratégicos da empresa;
• Indicadores acionáveis, que ajudam líderes a tomar decisões rápidas e seguras;
• Arquitetura de dados eficiente, conectando todas as fontes em uma base sólida e escalável;
• Suporte consultivo contínuo, garantindo que as soluções evoluam junto com o negócio.

Nosso compromisso é entender antes de automatizar.
Estratégia antes de dashboard.
Resultado antes de ferramenta.

É isso que transforma a Evolve Data em mais do que uma consultoria, mas em parceiro estratégico de dados que fala a língua do seu negócio.

Name: IOU.works - freelancers DAO & Decentralized portfolio on blockchain
Description:
Freelancers on centralized exchanges can be blocked for any reason and lose all their social capital: portfolio, ratings, and connections. We offer a solution in the form of a decentralized portfolio on the blockchain:
IOUtoken (literally, "I owe you" - "IOU"). A freelancer can create their own IOU tokens, store links to jobs there, and sell them to clients as a “job obligation.” After he/she has completed the work, the client "burns" the IOU and evaluates the work, thereby adding to the portfolio.

Our DAO blueprint: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/iou-works-coprosperity-dao-draft-iou-works/

Name: VERIFIK AI
Description:
A Verifik AI é uma empresa de tecnologia da informação altamente especializada no combate à fraude em sinistros de seguradoras. Nossa missão é fortalecer a integridade do setor de seguros, protegendo seguradoras e seus clientes contra atividades fraudulentas. Por meio de soluções avançadas e inovadoras, buscamos garantir que apenas reclamações legítimas sejam processadas, reduzindo perdas financeiras e promovendo transparência.



A missão da Verifik AI é utilizar tecnologia de ponta para detectar e prevenir fraudes em sinistros, aumentando a confiabilidade no mercado de seguros. Nosso compromisso é ajudar nossos clientes a otimizar recursos, diminuir custos operacionais e, simultaneamente, oferecer um serviço excepcional aos segurados.

Serviços:

Análise de Dados Avançada: Usamos algoritmos de aprendizado de máquina e inteligência artificial para analisar vastos conjuntos de dados de sinistros. Isso nos permite identificar padrões suspeitos e anomalias que sinalizam possíveis atividades fraudulentas.

Verificação de Identidade: Oferecemos soluções robustas de verificação de identidade, assegurando a autenticidade dos reclamantes por meio de verificação de documentos, autenticação biométrica e outras tecnologias avançadas.

Análise de Comportamento: Monitoramos o comportamento dos reclamantes ao longo do tempo, identificando quaisquer mudanças significativas que possam indicar fraudes, respeitando estritamente regulamentações de privacidade.

Relatórios Detalhados: Fornecemos relatórios detalhados e análises que auxiliam seguradoras na tomada de decisões informadas em relação a casos suspeitos.

Compromisso com a Ética:

Na Verifik AI, mantemos um compromisso inabalável com a ética e a privacidade. Nossas práticas de coleta e análise de dados seguem os mais altos padrões de respeito à privacidade dos indivíduos, garantindo a confidencialidade das informações.

Name: SWEEP NU AB
Description: The core problem in many companies is not the systems themselves (HR, CRM, etc.), but data leaks from those systems. Resumes are emailed, Social Security numbers are shared in chats, and sick-leave documents are stored locally. This is data that should not live on individual devices. Sweep solves this for every organization by enforcing data hygiene across tools. It informs the right people what data must be removed or secured, ensuring compliant, secure data handling.

Name: Indigenous Data Centres
Description:
Indigenous Data Centres provides a platform to support sovereign AI and data centre infrastructure, delivering a full, end-to-end technology stack entirely on Canadian soil for research, government, and industry.

We partner with Indigenous Nations to develop and operate Canadian-controlled, GPU-ready data centres designed to support advanced AI, research computing, and mission-critical workloads. Our facilities are engineered for high-density compute, energy efficiency, security, and resilience, enabling organizations to meet data residency, privacy, and sovereignty requirements while scaling responsibly.

Our platform goes beyond physical infrastructure. We offer an integrated technology stack that includes power, cooling, compute platforms, networking, security, and operations. Clients can bring their own hardware through colocation or access hosted AI compute aligned to their performance, governance, and compliance needs.

Indigenous Data Centres exists to enable innovation while ensuring Indigenous Peoples are leaders and long-term owners of the infrastructure powering Canada’s digital and AI economy. By combining Indigenous governance, Canadian hosting, and enterprise-grade technology, we support trusted collaboration across research institutions, public sector organizations, and industry.

Follow us for insights on sovereign AI, research compute, Indigenous economic leadership, and Canada’s digital infrastructure future.

Description: Créé en 1995, REALIA est devenu l’un des principaux cabinets de conseil indépendant en stratégie géomatique : SIG, Infrastructure de Données Géographiques, plateformes de mutualisation, BIM. REALIA assure des prestations de conseil et d’assistance à maîtrise d’ouvrage à toutes les étapes de votre projet : étude d’opportunité, de faisabilité, audit, schéma directeur, cahier des charges, suivi de marché, etc. REALIA vous accompagne dans l’organisation, la gestion et la gouvernance de vos données numériques, tout au long de leur cycle de vie : acquisition, normalisation, traitements, valorisation, diffusion, dans une perspective d’ouverture des données (open data), d’intelligence artificielle (IA), de big data, de territoires connectés (smart city).

Name: Goodash
Description:
Goodash levert expertise in datavisualisatie, data-integratie en analyse, waarbij we organisaties ondersteunen bij het vertalen van complexe gegevens naar bruikbare inzichten. Onze diensten richten zich op het centraliseren van data uit diverse bronnen, het bouwen van slimme datamodellen en het ontwikkelen van maatwerkoplossingen die aansluiten op de unieke informatiebehoeften van bedrijven in verschillende sectoren.

Naast onze kernexpertise in het toegankelijk maken van complexe databases, bevindt Goodash zich in de voorhoede van het bouwen van systemen die data beter laten samenwerken. We helpen organisaties om patronen te herkennen, processen te optimaliseren en datagedreven keuzes te maken, efficiënt, betrouwbaar en toekomstgericht.

Bij Goodash zijn we trots op onze samenwerkingsgerichte aanpak. We werken nauw samen met klanten om hun specifieke datastructuren, uitdagingen en doelstellingen te begrijpen. Of het nu gaat om financiële analyses, operationele verbeteringen of het koppelen van systemen: onze oplossingen worden op maat ontworpen om direct waarde te leveren.

Verder dan alleen analyse, maken wij gebruik van geavanceerde tools en methodologieën om waardevolle trends en inzichten te ontsluiten. Goodash is toegewijd om uw strategische partner te zijn in het transformeren van ruwe data tot een structurele meerwaarde, en zo innovatie en groei te stimuleren.

Name: LexIA
Description:
A LexIA nasceu para transformar a advocacia por meio da inteligência artificial. Nosso propósito é fortalecer advogados, escritórios e departamentos jurídicos com tecnologia que gera eficiência, reduz burocracia e apoia decisões mais estratégicas.

Diferente de soluções genéricas, a LexIA atua com sistema de Recuperação Aumentada por Geração (RAG) e integração direta a APIs oficiais como Planalto, LexML e tribunais superiores. Isso garante que nossas análises e documentos jurídicos sejam sempre baseados em fontes confiáveis, eliminando o risco de alucinações.

Com a LexIA você tem acesso a módulos exclusivos que cobrem as principais necessidades da rotina jurídica:

 LexDocs – automação de documentos jurídicos, petições, contratos e pareceres com segurança e conformidade técnica.
 LexScan – jurimetria avançada e análises preditivas para fundamentar estratégias e aumentar as chances de êxito.
 LexSyn – resumos inteligentes de processos, e-mails e documentos longos, organizados em linhas do tempo claras.
 LexOn – atendimento jurídico digital com leads validados, aumentando a presença e autoridade do advogado no mercado.
 LexOffice – gestão de processos, contratos, financeiro e colaboradores em um só lugar.

Cada módulo foi pensado para dar ao profissional do Direito mais tempo para se dedicar ao que realmente importa: construir estratégias sólidas, atender clientes com excelência e atuar de forma mais humana e próxima.

Acreditamos que a tecnologia não substitui o advogado. Pelo contrário, ela é uma aliada indispensável para ampliar resultados, garantir competitividade e abrir espaço para que a advocacia seja mais valorizada.

Com a LexIA você encontra o equilíbrio entre inovação e ética, utilizando inteligência artificial em conformidade com a legislação brasileira, a LGPD e as normas da OAB.

O futuro do Direito já está acontecendo. E ele começa aqui.

Name: ES Consultoria em Banco de Dados
Description:
Nosso objetivo é que o seu banco de dados trabalhe de uma forma mais performática e segura.

Monitoramento: Vamos monitorar seu banco de dados e verificar quais são os problemas que estão prejudicando o seu negócio.
Tuning: Vamos verificar quais são as suas querys mais ofensoras e avaliar  as melhorias necessárias que vai trazer uma melhor performance para o seu banco de dados.
Desaster Recover: Vamos criar um processo de recuperação dos seus dados, para que você se sinta mais seguro e obtenha uma rápida recuperabilidade, abaixo os tipos e processo de recuperação de dados:
- Backup and Restore Databases.
- Failover Clustering.
- Always-On Availability Groups.
- Database Mirroring.
- SQL Server Replication.
- Log Shipping.

Azure SQL: Administramos o seu banco de dados em nuvem e criamos os melhores processos em cloud, com segurança e um bom custo benefício.
Migração: Migramos o seu banco de dados para as versões mais recentes do mercado, e elaboramos um relatório para compreender e apontar as tendências de comportamento, desempenho e potencial do seu ambiente, on-primise ou cloud.

Overall, Affistash empowers tech companies to accelerate their affiliate and partner recruitment efforts by harnessing the capabilities of AI. We are concentrating on energy and production efficiency. 

Applying our energy data management system, energy savings in your production environment will become visible and understandable. After your implementation of corresponding actions for saving the energy, the energy savings counter will count on a daily base how much energy has been saved by you per day!

Thus your energy data management system answers three of your main energy questions: 

-- how large is my energy savings potential? 
-- how much time does the amortization period take?
-- how much energy did I already save?

You can extend your energy data management system by additional sensors for archiving Key Performance Indicator (KPI) values. Those sensors include cameras, lasers, microphones and heat, pressure and  flow rate measurement equipment.

With those sensors the data management system calculates KPI values, which provide a fundamental database to help you to make clear decisions on how to proceed for further energy savings. 

We have deep savings experiences in recycling and food industry, injection molding as well as metal, plastics and wood processing.

Name: cirQit AG
Description:
Wann hast du dich das letzte Mal geärgert über nicht vorhandene, nicht aktuelle oder unvollständige Schaltpläne im Ablagefach vom Schaltschrank ? Nicht nur das deine Geduld und deine Nerven auf die Probe gestellt werden, du und dein Kunde verlieren dadurch auch noch Zeit und Geld ! Nicht nur währenden der Störungsbehebung, sondern auch weil ein gewissenhafter Nachtrag zeitaufwendig ist .

Damit ist jetzt Schluss, mit cirQit gehören Elektroschaltpläne und Anlagedokumentationen in Papierform in die Vergangenheit . Die cloudbasierte Webapplikation cirQit ermöglicht Zugang zu digitalen Elektroschaltplänen und deren Aktualisierung für alle beteiligten Akteure . Immer aktuell, immer verfügbar, immer editierbar und vollkommen Standort unabhängig.

Bis zum heutigen Tag werden Elektroschaltpläne und technische Dokumentationen auf den Anlagen vor Ort in Papierform hinterlegt . Oft gehen diese über die Jahre ganz oder teilweise verloren, werden unleserlich und Änderungen werden nicht gewissenhaft nachgeführt. 

Mit cirQit wollen wir Papierschemas aus den Schalt- und Steuerschränken verbannen! In Zukunft gibt es nur noch einen QR-Code im Schaltschrank . Über ein mobiles Gerät wie Handy oder Tab können die Unterlagen abgerufen und eingesehen werden. Allfällige Änderungen werden mit dem integrierten Zeicheneditor direkt vor Ort editiert .
Der Ersteller des originalen Schaltplanes wird benachrichtigt, kann die Änderungen auf seinem CAD vornehmen und hinterlegt die revidierte Version als PDF-Export wieder auf der cirQit-Cloud.

Kein Hin und Her mehr per Mail, ausdrucken einzelner Seiten und Fahrt zur Anlage zum ablegen vor Ort. Nichts geht mehr verloren! Versehentlich gelöschte Schaltplantaschen können einfach wieder hergestellt werden. Und obendrauf, keine Brandlast mehr im Schaltschrank durch Papiermappen und Ordner.

cirQit, befreit Schaltpläne vom Papier!

Name: YieldComputer
Description:
FieldInsights is a breakthrough agri-intelligence platform designed to make predictive crop monitoring and yield forecasting accessible to growers globally, regardless of their technological infrastructure. It integrates advanced edge-based vision systems, AI forecasting, and low-cost, in-house developed hardware to serve all cultivation types—from high-tech greenhouses to remote open-field farms.

At the core is the SmartCropCam, a solar-powered, LTE-enabled camera built specifically for all kinds off agricultural environments. It collects high-resolution imagery and climate data around the clock, ensuring a steady data flow critical for robust AI performance. Its affordability enables deployment in both developed and emerging markets.

Key capabilities of the platform include:
Automated berry counting and phenotype recognition
Growth phase identification across diverse crops
Accurate yield forecasting 

FieldInsights is trained on many globally sourced harvests, ensuring reliability across various climates and farming systems. The system requires minimal manual input and converts complex data into simple, localized guidance.

This farmer-centric approach helps all size growers by removing the need to interpret technical dashboards, democratising access to AI insights.

FieldInsights supports:
Reduced food waste via timely harvesting
Efficient labor allocation through accurate yield prediction
Enhanced grower resilience, especially in data-poor regions
The system aligns with sustainability goals such as the EU Green Deal, sustainable pesticide use directives, and SDG 12 for responsible production.

Name: Jumeaux Numériques du Fleuve
Description:
Les fleuves sont désormais menacés par le changement climatique et l’exploitation humaine intensive de la ressource en eau. L’urgence actuelle imposée par les enjeux du dérèglement climatique implique une mobilisation encore plus forte autour des fleuves afin d’évaluer les trajectoires des stratégies territoriales actuelles et futures. 

Deux défis nous apparaissent prioritaires, la préservation de la ressource en eau, et la prévention des risques de submersion et d’érosion du littoral. Seule une vision d’ensemble des ressources, usages, menaces et perspectives permettra d’identifier la fragilité des équilibres actuels et futurs entre ressources et besoins.

Des outils collaboratifs viennent d'être coconstruits avec les acteurs de l’eau de la Gironde afin d'accélérer la résilience territoriale face aux enjeux du changement climatique : 
-> Agence de l’eau Adour Garonne
-> EPIDOR
-> SHOM
-> SMEAG
-> SMIDDEST
-> VNF

Ces outils Open source nécessitent maintenant une Gouvernance partagée afin de créer des Communs Numériques au service des territoires, c’est à dire une ressource numérique gérée et gouvernée par une communauté de producteurs et d'utilisateurs selon des règles de gouvernance conjointement élaborées. Ils vont permettre de répondre à de nombreuses questions liées au changement climatique et aux activités humaines :
-> Evaluer les stratégies territoriales actuelles et à venir d'équilibre offre-demande de la ressource en eau à grande échelle
-> Favoriser l’hydro-diplomatie au sein des territoires et entre les territoires
-> Prévention des risques liées aux submersions (méga-pluies)
-> Érosion du littoral
-> Eclairage des citoyens sur les enjeux et les arbitrages afin de favoriser l’acceptation de la politique territoriale et les changements d’usages de l’eau à venir.

Rejoignez la Communauté d'usagers et de contributeurs et soutenez cette initiative de développement de Communs Numériques pour faire face aux enjeux civilisationnels et environnementaux !

Name: Intervalo de Confiança
Description:
Estamos vivenciando uma nova onda da Revolução Industrial, na qual a informação se torna cada vez mais central em nossa sociedade. Competimos com máquinas cada vez mais rápidas e inteligentes. Em um ambiente que parece cada vez mais hostil, entender sobre dados é mais importante do que nunca.

Com base nessa premissa, surge o podcast Intervalo de Confiança. Trata-se de um podcast semanal de Ciência e Jornalismo de Dados. O podcast também possui site e uma comunidade, onde é possível acompanhar todas as novidades, interagir com outros ouvintes e com a própria equipe.

Atualmente, existem quatro tipos de programas no Intervalo de Confiança. O principal é o próprio "Intervalo de Confiança", com periodicidade quinzenal, onde abordamos assuntos relacionados à nossa área de cobertura, relacionados à ciência e inteligência artificial, tratados com mais profundidade. Nas semanas em que não há o programa principal, intercalam-se dois spin-offs: "Variância", um programa mais curto, normalmente gravado por apenas uma pessoa, focando em um tema específico de maneira direta; e "Influencers da Ciência", em formato similar ao "Variância", mas dedicado à biografia de uma figura relevante na ciência, portanto, com um caráter mais biográfico. Além disso, apresentamos semanalmente no nosso canal do YouTube o "Teorema de Segunda". Este é um programa com vídeos breves, dedicados a explicar curiosidades científicas de maneira fácil de entender e interessante.

O Intervalo de Confiança não se destina exclusivamente a cientistas de dados ou jornalistas. O objetivo é que seja um espaço inclusivo para todos. Desde conceitos básicos até os mais complexos, abordaremos uma variedade de temas de forma acessível, visando incluir até aqueles sem conhecimento prévio sobre o assunto.

O objetivo do Intervalo de Confiança é ajudar o público em geral a identificar as armadilhas a que somos expostos diariamente ao nos depararmos com dados, sejam eles reais, manipulados ou mesmo inventados.

Name: SiLA Consortium
Description:
The SiLA Consortium is non-profit. It gathers life science experts and mobilizes the industry while developing free & open system communication and data standards to connect scientists with the data that matters.
SiLA and its members provide a framework for the exchange, integration, sharing, and retrieval of electronic laboratory information. These standards define how information is transported from one system to another. Setting the language, structure and data types required for seamless integration, SiLA supports the management, delivery, and evaluation of laboratory services. SiLA is recognized as the most commonly used in the world.

Through the partnership with ASTM-AnIML, SiLA has proven that integration can be realized beyond data/file transmission to an automation control software. Furthermore it extends all the way to the LIMS- and the ELN-level. AnIML is embedded into SiLA and serves as the vehicle to transport method and result data throughout an integrated lab.

SiLA treats of everything as a service. This enables flexible interaction, connection processes and great agility. Lab systems benefit from the elegant core concepts SiLA developed in the short term – and in the long term too. Changing the lab setup is easy with SiLA. No big integration process, no data formatting problems, no communication complications. SiLA enables the vision of a future lab today. 

The standard offers:
•	Increased efficiency and sustainability
•	Vendor independence
•	Uniform data formats
•	Combine your systems
•	True plug&play
•	Quick success
•	High flexibility
•	No license fees

Name: SYMBA EU Project
Description:
The SYMBA project aims at creating a new and innovative IS method to be replicated within EU according to the local/regional bio-based industrial ecosystem. SYMBA will implement a user-friendly and accessible AI database suggesting regional IS innovative processes to create zero-waste value chains, ensuring more local supply chains; a
better distribution of economic and social benefits among the stakeholders and an increase in the economic value of final products.
SYMBA solution, aligned with the EU Bioeconomy Strategy, is based on a threefold approach:
1) Creation and validation of new IS methodology for the bio-based sector, starting from existing knowledge and lessons earned from SYMBA consortium partners.
2) Individuation of criteria to select regional hubs
3) AI database including Monitoring tools, waste relation matrix, networking and cooperation with ongoing EU and local networks.
Project funded by European Union under GA 101135562.

Name: Scrab.com
Description:
Scrab.com is a tool that helps you analyze the fundamentals of any stock in an automatic way. It makes the dull and complex fundamental analysis done in seconds, almost effortlessly.

SCRAB uses the approach called 'fundamental scoring', in which our system evaluates dozens of fundamental indicators, such as debt levels or revenue forecasts, and assigns an appropriate score to each indicator. Thanks to that, we are able to rank almost 40,000 global companies from the best to the worst in terms of their profitability, financial stability, or current valuation.

By using SCRAB, you can also set up your own criteria to employ a screener to search for the best investment opportunities around the globe. You can visualize and analyze the data manually on a chart or build a fully automated scoring model. 

Additionally, you can backtest your strategy and periodically rebalance your portfolio to ensure your money is invested in the best set of stocks at all times.

In this way, you save a lot of time by automating your analysis and ensuring your investment decisions are 100% data-driven and completely unbiased.

Name: HumSafer Driver Safety App
Description:
About HumSafer App:
HumSafer’s Vision is to have zero road accidents and ensure to have prosperous truck drivers. 
We are committed to the mission of making Indian Roads Safer. 
We have built a mobile application for Truck Drivers which uses AI to help prevent road accidents by over 60%. 
 
 
The  key focus areas are: 
Our primary target are the truck driversin India (approximately 80 lakhs)in safety and improving their lives.
Our product has the Potential to save over 100 lives every day from road accidents. As 80% accidents are due to human error and avoidable. 
 
What problem are you trying to solve? Why this problem? 
According to NHAI data about 60% of road accidents in India happen because of bad driving practices while 20% are caused due to sleep deprivation. Also, 65% of the deaths that occur in our country are caused due to the collision of trucks in an accident. 
Through real time intervention in their local language we will help truck drivers make safer choices on the road, lower their chances of meeting with accidents, and connect this largely fragmented network to foster a sense of community and make them prosperous members of society.   
Why this problem? 
According to the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways, on the Indian roads there are around 5 lakh accidents every year, resulting in 2,00,000 deaths, on an average India records about 400 deaths a day.  
According to National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) More than 65% of the accidents happen on National Highways, 50% of the victims are below the age of 35 years. 
 
While existing safety solutions in the market like GPS devices and sleep detection exist they aren't affordable or made available to the vast majority (over 80% of the unorganized 80 lakhs truck drivers in the market) 
More than 90% of truck drivers have smartphones.

Name: PostgresML
Description:
PostgresML is a complete MLOps platform built on PostgreSQL, powered by GPUs. Build simpler, faster and more scalable apps with the the AI infrastructure of the future. 

 How it works:  

PostgresML allows you to take advantage of the fundamental relationship between data and models. The data for ML & AI systems is inherently larger and more dynamic than the models. It's more efficient, effective and safer to move the models to the database rather than continuously moving the data to the models. 

From forecasting, to search (RAG), chatbots and more — create a bespoke AI app with the latest LLMs, natural language processing and ML techniques using the simplicity of SQL or your preferred language. All within an extensible, open-source database.

Name: Digital Business Networks Alliance
Description:
Welcome to the Digital Business Networks Alliance!

OUR STORY
 Established in 2023, the Digital Business Network Alliance is an independent, tax-exempt company (501(c)6) with a board elected by its members. Our unique strength lies in our balanced industry-based Board of Directors, ensuring equal representation of Service Providers and Customers. The Alliance was founded by participants from the Business Payments Coalition's E-invoice Exchange Market Pilot and now serves as the legal entity overseeing the Exchange Framework.

OUR MISSION
 At the Digital Business Networks Alliance, our mission is clear: to operate an electronic delivery exchange network available for use by all businesses in the United States. We're here to support the digital delivery of electronic business documents in a manner that allows customers of all service providers to communicate seamlessly with customers of all other service providers.

OUR STANDARDS
 The heart of our Exchange Framework beats to a set of open, non-proprietary technical standards and policies. These standards empower businesses to discover and deliver data securely across a virtual network with one another. Security is paramount, and we ensure this through enhanced security settings and capabilities, making sure that electronic documents are exchanged safely and securely.

Join us in this digital evolution! The Digital Business Networks Alliance is your gateway to a connected, secure, and efficient future in the digital business realm. Connect with us to become part of this exciting journey.  #DigitalBusiness #ExchangeFramework

Name: Policloud
Description:
For too long, businesses, cities, and institutions have had to rent space in someone else’s cloud, following rules set by foreign providers. PoliCloud changes that.

 A new cloud model

PoliCloud is a sovereign, sustainable, and cost-efficient cloud alternative—built for those who want full control over their data. Instead of relying on massive, centralized data centers, PoliCloud offers micro data centers that can be deployed anywhere, giving organizations the power to own their cloud infrastructure and operate independently from Big Tech.

 Why PoliCloud?

 Sovereign & Secure – Your data stays local, private, and under your control, fully aligned with EU and national regulations.
 Decentralized & Autonomous – Deploy PoliCloud anywhere, from a smart city hub to an AI research facility.
 Sustainable by Design – No water waste, 75% lower CO₂ emissions, and up to 60% cost savings compared to traditional cloud solutions.
 High-Performance Compute – AI-ready, scalable, and built for real-world applications.

 Designed for Cities, Enterprises & Institutions

PoliCloud is the ideal solution for:

- Government & Public Services – Data sovereignty without compromise.
- AI & Research – High-performance computing that’s cost-efficient and scalable.
- Healthcare & Sensitive Data – Secure cloud infrastructure tailored for compliance.
- Businesses & Local Organizations – Own your cloud, reduce costs, and stay independent.

 The future of cloud is sovereign

Europe and governments worldwide are recognizing the need for digital independence. PoliCloud is leading the charge by proving that cloud computing can be efficient, secure, and free from foreign dependencies.

 Join us

The cloud should work for you—not the other way around. PoliCloud is cloud reimagined, built to be smarter, greener, and under your control.

Name: Natural Intelligence Systems
Description:
Natural Intelligence Systems is an Artificial Intelligence company that uses a pattern-based machine learning system based on how the human brain actually works. Our neuromorphic computing system requires very little data, so people can make smarter and faster decisions with greater confidence than they can using traditional AI.

We now know that the human brain uses patterns to process data and learn. So if our brains are pattern-based, why is current AI technology – which claims to mirror the brain – still based on old mathematical theories? The next generation of AI requires a novel approach inspired by how the human brain actually works. 

That's why we've reinvented how intelligence can be extracted from information and placed it into a cloud service that data scientists will immediately recognize. With a better algorithm, we package ours in an API that allows easy integration into customer applications. 

Natural Intelligence allows data scientists to integrate more intelligence into their AI systems and enables their organizations to make better decisions in less time. We're leveraging the most advanced neuroscience to build better, more intelligent systems. Our founding traces back to our work at Micron Technology, where we developed the world's most powerful and efficient pattern processor. 

Data scientists are yearning for more explainable and insightful AI that can work with the imperfect data sets they have. Our Neuromorphic machine learning system provides unsupervised learning, explainable results, anomaly detection, and incremental training. 

Our Pattern-based Machine Learning architecture pushes past the constraints of today’s AI/ML systems by delivering more useful, understandable, and actionable information.

Natural Intelligence Systems is dedicated to building the software and hardware that will emulate the pattern-based learning of the human brain and provide a new level of context and explainability to our AI systems.

Name: Decept10
Description: Our Security Operations Center (SOC) uses advanced deception technology by deploying decoys within the infrastructure to mimic real assets. When attackers target a decoy, our SOC logs, reports, and monitors the attack to minimize customer impact. Decept10's platform offers proactive network monitoring, seamless integration with current systems, advanced reporting, and real-time information. In addition, we provide a SIEM/SOC solution that can be deployed within hours, US-based support, incident response retainer and consulting, as well as best-in-class tools for analyzing network traffic to identify real-time threats. Our deception technology adds an extra layer of defense to detect advanced threats.

Name: The Data Group

Welcome to The Data Group — where data problems get solved.

We help businesses own, organize, and unleash the power of their data to fuel growth, efficiency, and competitive advantage. Our approach is simple, effective, and even a little fun—because data doesn't have to be complicated to be transformational.

The Data Group was founded on one big idea: make data easy. For 20 years, we’ve helped companies across the U.S. own, transform and use their most valuable asset—their data.

We proudly serve 300+ amazing clients nationwide from our home base in Birmingham, AL. With innovative tools like Alpha, Echo, Foxtrot, Sierra, and Tango, we’ve built a reputation for solving tough data challenges with speed, clarity, and results.

What We Believe:
 Data: We believe data is your most valuable asset—and we help you use effectively
 Results: From building data warehouses to deploying APIs, we deliver fast, meaningful impact.

At The Data Group, we’re not here to sell software—we’re here to solve your data problems. Let’s build something great with your data.

Name: BR Career Tech
Description:
BR Career Tech is built on a simple belief: every individual and every business deserves a strong digital presence without needing a developer, designer, or a technical background. We started by noticing how students, jobseekers, and even working professionals struggle with basic things like building an ATS-friendly resume, writing a compelling cover letter, or creating a clean personal website. At the same time, small companies and freelancers often face the same challenge—no time, no technical team, and no budget to build a proper company website.

That gap is exactly where our platform fits.

We use advanced AI to automate the most time-consuming parts of professional growth. Whether it’s turning a raw resume into a fully optimised, ATS-ready version, generating a personalised cover letter for any job role, or creating a complete personal or company website in minutes, our tools make the process effortless. Many early users—students and professionals we tested with—were able to build a better professional identity in a single evening than they had achieved in months.

BR Career Tech is also expanding beyond documents and websites. Jobseekers often told us that even after improving their resumes, they lacked confidence in interviews or didn’t know how to prepare properly. To solve this, we’re building AI-driven interview practice modules and coaching tools that analyse performance, suggest improvements, and help candidates train in a structured way—just like a personalised mentor.

Institutes and coaching centres face a similar problem: creating digital content, assessments, and portals takes time and money. Our future modules will give them plug-and-play AI tools that make it easy to offer tests, materials, and career-oriented guidance without hiring big technical teams.

Our mission is straightforward:
to make career building, skill development, and digital branding faster, smarter, and more affordable—powered entirely by AI.

Name: Cogniwaves
Description:
IA Responsable Par Conception, Pas Par Promesse

Cogniwaves aide les organisations à déployer l'intelligence artificielle de manière sécuritaire, éthique et conforme aux réglementations — par architecture, pas par politiques vides.

Le problème
Les entreprises déploient des systèmes d'IA sans architecture de sécurité, sans gestion systématique des risques, sans conformité vérifiable.  Le MIT AI Risk Repository catalogue +1,700 risques documentés. L'EU AI Act entre en application en 2025. Les poursuites pour biais algorithmique coûtent des millions. Pendant ce temps, les consultants vendent des promesses dans des PowerPoints.

Notre approche

Nous appliquons des méthodologies éprouvées depuis des décennies (SABSA, ISO 42001, TOGAF) à l'architecture de sécurité des systèmes d'IA. 

Notre framework SABSA AI Grid intègre:
    • SABSA 6 couches — architecture de sécurité traçable 
    • ISO 42001 AI Management System — standard international publié déc. 2023 
    • MIT AI Risk Repository — 2,244 risques avec cartographie complète des contrôles 

Résultat: architecture traçable du besoin d'affaires jusqu'aux contrôles opérationnels. Pas de templates génériques. Architecture spécifique à votre contexte.

Expertise introuvable ailleurs au Canada
    • ISO 42001 Senior Lead Implementer 
    • SABSA Chartered Security Architect — Architecture Design (A3)
    • Certified in Risk and Information Systems Control 
    • TOGAF Certified + ArchiMate 3 Practitioner

Name: Cibicom A/S
Description:
Cibicom A/S is an independent network operator and Internet Service Provider (ISP).
We own and run the nationwide network of up to 300 metres high radio and tv broadcast towers, which are used for purposes such as the distribution of TV (DTT) and radio (AM/FM/DAB+), IoT infrastructure and emergency response communication in Denmark.

We have built up a national, redundant and fibre-based IP backbone and access network (3,500 km) that connects our data centres, nodes and other network operators. Cibicom delivers solutions and services to essential communications and services to Coastal Radio and the Danish Defence and infrastructure to telecoms operators.

Since November 2018, Cibicom has been owned by the European equity fund Agilitas Private Equity LLP.

Cibicom changed its name from Teracom in January 2019.
The name Cibicom is a contraction of “Critical Infrastructure for Broadcasting, IoT and Communication”.

Cibicom has subsequently enhanced its competence in the service and installation of masts and mobile networks through the acquisition of swedish Relacom’s Danish activities in 2019 (now Cibicom Services A/S) and the acquisition of norwegian ICE Group's danish activities in ICE Danmark ApS (now Cibicom Mobility ApS) in 2020. Both companies are now 100%-owned subsidiaries of Cibicom A/S.

Name: +962NFC Amman - Jordan
Description:
NFC (Near Field Communication) technology has revolutionized the way we exchange information, and smart business cards utilizing NFC are at the forefront of this innovation. 
Let’s delve into the world of NFC business cards and explore their advantages and features.

What Are +962NFC Business Cards?

NFC business cards are modern versions of traditional paper business cards. They leverage Near Field Communication, a wireless technology that enables data exchange between devices when they are in close proximity1. Here’s why they’re gaining popularity:
1-Instant Connection: With a simple tap, you can instantly share your contact information, making networking more efficient.

2-Wireless Exchange: No need for physical handoffs—just touch your NFC card to someone’s phone, and your details are transferred.

3-Secure and Regulated: NFC technology is standardized and regulated, ensuring reliable communication.

4-No Network Dependency: Unlike some apps, NFC doesn’t rely on network connectivity.

5-Eco-Friendly: By reducing paper waste, NFC cards contribute to a greener environment.

Unique Features of +962 NFC Smart Cards

1-Easy Information Management: Adding and modifying your information is hassle-free.

2-High-Quality Printing: These cards are printed using advanced UV technology, ensuring a professional look.

3-Warranty: Trust in the product is backed by a one-year warranty against technical faults.

4-Digital Transformation: Your paper business card design is transformed into a dynamic NFC smart card.

5-High-Quality Display: When tapped, your card design appears on mobile screens in high resolution (up to 2000px).

6-Cutting-Edge Printing: The latest printing technology ensures your design shines in the best light.

Whether you’re a business professional, entrepreneur, or creative, NFC business cards offer a seamless way to share information and leave a lasting impression. Consider exploring providers like Popl, Mobile, or Wave for a range of NFC card options.

Name: AI - Tools & News
Description:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools have revolutionized the way we write and generate content. There are several AI tools available in the market that claims to help you write better, faster and more efficiently. In this article, we will discuss some of the popular AI writing tools and their features.

Starting with CopyMatic AI is an AI blog tool that can generate all types of content in seconds. It is a plagiarism-free tool and writes unique and fresh content. The Sentence rewriter AI understands the user's sentence and rewrites it in a unique and smart way. This tool is said to boost your content marketing with AI.

BetterWriter AI is another AI writing tool that claims to help you write 1,000 words in 20 minutes. It has 20+ writing tools for different tasks and claims to write with 10x speed. With this tool, you can write a blog with 1000 words in 20 minutes, and generate a blog outline, intro paragraph, and outro paragraph in under 2 minutes.

There are several other AI writing tools such as Writesonic, YouChat, and Socratic by Google, which is considered the best AI writer for different purposes.

AI story writer is another AI writing tool that claims to write stories 10x faster. The tool reduces writer's block and helps in writing stories within a few minutes.

OpenAI has recently launched a new AI text classifier tool to detect AI-generated text. The tool requires a minimum of 1,000 characters, which is approximately 150-250 words and its result is not always accurate.

Copy AI is a free AI writing tool that claims to generate over 90 different types of web content. You can add the title and keyword for your post, evaluate your outline and important talking points, and let Copy AI write your first draft.

Writecream's AI story generator is another AI writing tool that claims to help you write 1000+ word stories in no time. The tool allows you to scale up your writing and includes out-of-the-box ideas in your stories.

Why conform to ESG precepts?

All organisations have a potential for positive or negative impact on the context in which they operate. When there is self-responsibility and willingness to add value to this environment, organisations are able to put into practice some great positive transformations that go beyond their employees and the local environment and economy – they influence cultures and futures.

ESG practices have been improving social and business ecosystems for many years, gradually. Today, adapting to the ESG principles through environmental protection, social responsibility and governance actions also means receiving recognition and admiration from various stakeholders. ESG development enables an organisation's symbiotic relationship with its environment.
We at Leap believe this is the only possible way to do things, if we want to thrive and keep thriving.

Name: Urban Hawk Data Intelligence Limited
Description:
Urban Hawk Ltd, headquartered in Bristol, UK, is an R&D-driven company advancing spatial computing up to TRL 6. Grant-supported and research-focused, we develop prototype digital twins, simulations, and predictive models that enhance security, safety, automation, robotics, risk assessment, insurance, and operational management.

Using the Polaron World Engine, we transform aerial and ground scans into interactive datasets for simulation and analysis. This enables early-stage scenario modeling, cause-effect predictions, and risk mitigation—supporting prototypes such as factory robotics integration, safety protocols in high-risk environments, and automation workflows that cut downtime and waste.

Our staged approach emphasizes low-risk prototyping and grant-funded pathways with industry and academic partners, ensuring cutting-edge research without commercial pressures. Past successes include the Sea Traffic Management Validation Project and Horizon 2020’s 5G-VICTORI, with ongoing UKRI-funded National Resilience projects. Applications span wargaming for security, predictive analytics for insurance, and resilient operational models.

Backed by the UK Space Agency and UKRI, and led by CEO Robert Sugar and CTO John Tapsfield, Urban Hawk serves as the foundational research arm for commercial spin-offs, extending spatial tech into urban-industrial use cases.

Partner with us to co-develop next-generation situational awareness and prototype the future today.

Baş ofisi Türkiyənin İstanbul şəhərində yerləşən Bulutistan Türkiyədən Equinix Qlobal Bağlantı (Bulud Mübadiləsi) Şəbəkəsinə inteqrasiya edən ilk şirkət olaraq İT xidmətlərinin ixracını artırmağa yönəlmiş bulud hesablama operatoru kimi əlavə dəyərli bulud xidmətləri təqdim edir.

SAP Cloud həlləri sahəsində dərin təcrübəyə malik Bulutistan Türkiyə və Avropadakı təşkilatlara yüksək performanslı, yüksək əlçatan və idarə olunan SAP xidmətləri təklif edir. Bu gün Bulutistan Türkiyənin 500 ən böyük şirkətində 350-dən çox şirkətə, ən yaxşı 1000 qurum arasında 600-dən çox təşkilata və 20 ən böyük holdinqdən 16 şirkətə bulud xidməti göstərir.

2020-ci ilin sonunda Ak Portfolio, 2022-ci ilin aprelində Sabancı Ventures-dan iki mühüm investisiya alən Bulutistan, 2019-cu ildə Deloitte EMEA FAST 500 siyahısında EMEA regionunun ən sürətlə böyüyən texnologiya şirkətləri arasında 20-ci yerdə qərarlaşırken 2020-ci ildə Deloitte Technology Fast 50 Türkiyə Proqramı tərəfindən Türkiyənin ən sürətlə böyüyən texnologiya şirkəti seçildi ve Müştəri İnnovasiyası və Transformasiyasına Dəstəkləyən Üstün Xidmətlərə görə 2020-ci il IBM Beacon Mükafatını qazanmışdır.

Öz sahəsində çox təcrübəli olan 100-dən çox əməkdaşımız və ekosistemimizdə birlikdə fəaliyyət göstərdiyimiz strateji həll tərəfdaşlarımızla birlikdə təcrübəli xidmət göstərən, ümumilikdə 500 nəfərdən ibarət bulud hesablama platformasıyı olan Bulutistan dünyanın nəhəng bulud xidməti təminatçıları tərəfindən təklif olunan birinci dərəcəli xidmət keyfiyyəti və yüksək təhlükəsizliyi təmin edən CSA STAR sertifikatına diqqət yetirərək qlobal standartlara uyğun bir şirkət kimi tanınır.

Name: eMed Support Systems
Description:
eMedSup is a Software as a Service Digital Twin Technology that transforms cardiovascular care by processing Electronic Health Records (EHR) data through clinical knowledge-based algorithms derived from established clinical guidelines.

The platform features microservices of evidence-based medicine tools that support Guideline-Directed Medical Therapy (GDMT) strategies. AI-powered advanced analytics analyze individual patient characteristics including vital signs, medical history, laboratory results, and medication-related side effects to automatically determine optimal personalized evidence-based medicine (EBM) treatments.

The algorithms are built on comprehensive databases from high-quality randomized clinical trials and established clinical guidelines, ensuring robust clinical decision support. The platform serves as a reliable data source for LLM AI agents, making clinical support more accessible and transparent for healthcare providers.

eMedSup has created a self-sufficient ecosystem for collecting quality Big Data in medicine, analyzing patient information, and training AI systems to select the most effective therapy for each individual patient. The company's mission is to bridge the gap in utilising real-world data for personalised patient care through intelligent automation.

At Qala, we empower CISOs, DPOs and Product Engineering teams with continuous data visibility at the source – across any environment and any product. We help organizations identify risks, optimize operations, and build with confidence.

Our platform is designed for companies developing complex digital products that rely on distributed systems and handle sensitive data. Whether you're a scale-up managing customer data pipelines, a fintech ensuring compliance and transparency, or a SaaS company seeking to maintain trust while shipping fast, Qala gives you the observability and control you need right where your data lives.

Who we serve:
- CISOs and Information Security officers striving to proactively detect data risks and minimize exposure.
- DPOs, Privacy counsel and compliance teams working to ensure privacy, security, and regulatory alignment are embedded from the ground up.
- Product Engineering leaders looking to reduce technical debt, accelerate delivery, and maintain trust.
- Platform teams and data engineers who want to simplify data governance and enforce policies by design.

We know that modern products run on data. But with data spread across microservices, third-party APIs, and multi-cloud environments, gaining a unified view is challenging. Qala bridges this gap, delivering actionable insights into your data’s journey – without heavy integrations or disrupting your workflows.

By providing visibility at the source, we enable your teams to:
- Detect anomalies and compliance risks instantly.
- Trace data flows to reduce incidents and speed up audits.
- Build user trust by ensuring privacy and integrity from the ground up.
- Increase procurement and risk assessment speed and trust

Join us in reshaping how companies understand and protect their most valuable asset – their data.

Velox is developing technology that will fully leverage and build upon the great foundation in the clinical data ecosystem that is being established by two major factors today:
 
Standards: Interoperability standards, most importantly HL7's FHIR standard
Regulations: The 21st Century Cures Act of 2016 and the resulting Interoperability Rules.
 
Velox's technology and solutions allow all participants in this ecosystem to transition to and fully take advantage of structured, standards-based clinical data and in doing so transform the healthcare system for the better. Specifically, it will:
 
•	Lower data acquisition costs from Dollars to Cents
•	Increase speed from weeks to seconds
•	Increase completeness of data and confidence to >95%
•	Transform care and payer operations
•	Reduce cost-of-care by >10%

Wir entwickeln eine fahrzeugunabhängige Lösung, um Fahrzeugdaten abzugreifen und zu nutzen: plug-and play für Werkstatt und Flotte, um den Fahrzeugzustand zu ermitteln.
In der IT-Welt stehen uns heute Softwaresysteme zur Verfügung, die in Bezug auf Effizienz, Usability und Datenanalyse völlig neue Möglichkeiten eröffnen. Wir wollen diese für die Bahnbranche nutzbar machen. 
Unser Ziel ist es, sowohl die Fahrzeugverfügbarkeit und die Sicherheit im SPNV zu erhöhen, und gleichzeitig den Energieverbrauch zu senken und die Mitarbeitenden optimal zu unterstützen (#Fachkräftemangel). Gerade in der Instandhaltung werden viel Zeit und Schweiß durch ungenutzte Daten verbraucht. 
Daher: Ressourcen nutzen = Ressourcen schonen!

Name: Siana
Description:
At Siana, we specialize in helping manufacturing companies prevent costly unplanned production stops and downtime that result from critical machines unexpectedly breaking down due to wear and tear.

We achieve this through our intuitive and autonomous predictive maintenance system, which can monitor rotating machines such as motors, pumps, bearings, and similar equipment, automatically predicting failures and breakdowns.

By leveraging our technology, maintenance staff can proactively plan and perform maintenance tasks before emerging issues lead to production stops. This approach reduces unplanned downtime, enhances overall productivity and operational reliability, and lowers costs associated with wasted resources.

Our technology comprises the Siana Sensor Device, which can be easily and non-intrusively mounted on machines with universal support. It connects to our cloud platform through the user-friendly Siana App and via a direct cellular connection, eliminating the need for routers or gateways.

On the Siana Platform, users can conveniently monitor the status of all their machines, easily identifying which ones require servicing and which ones are operating as expected.

Our ISO-certified facilities ensure your media is handled in a secure environment by trained specialists. We also offer free secure courier collection for your device and a complimentary return if you decide not to proceed.

Data loss is stressful, but we make recovery simple. You’ll have a dedicated advisor keeping you updated at every stage, and our engineers will do everything possible to restore what matters most to you.

Fields Data Recovery has grown into one of the most recognised names in professional data recovery, not because we shout the loudest, but because we deliver. When others say it can’t be done, we often prove otherwise.

Lost data doesn’t have to stay lost. Contact Fields Data Recovery today for a free diagnostic and discover why thousands trust us to bring their data back to life.

Name: Matter-ID
Description:
For individuals with a government-issued biometric passport or ID card, Matter-ID seamlessly transforms it into a secure digital identity, ensuring interoperability and the highest level of security.

The Matter-ID digital identity certificate, combined with distributed public key infrastructure (DPKI), creates an unalterable record of all transactions, providing tamper-proof evidence of each usage for accountability and compliance.

Matter-ID is available as a versatile white-label solution, enabling countries and organizations to rebrand and tailor the platform to meet their specific requirements. For government implementations, a white-label Matter-ID can serve as the foundation for national digital transformation.

Matter-ID can be seamlessly integrated as a secure login method to provide relying parties with IAM (Identity and Access Management) and SSO (Single Sign-On) services. Matter-ID replaces outdated verification methods such as email, username-password, and traditional two-factor authentication, offering a seamless, user-centric digital identity experience.

Matter-ID is designed to align with eIDAS 2.0 requirements and will seek full compliance as regulatory frameworks evolve.

We understand that mission-critical systems demand bespoke solutions, as every organisation and/or country has unique needs, objectives, and regulatory landscapes.

5. Limited Integration: Integrating data extraction solutions with other systems can be challenging. Rivelio.ai provides in-depth integrations, making it easier to connect with various IT systems.

What sets Rivelio.ai apart?

Name: Delaware Health Information Network
Description:
In 2007 the Delaware Health Information Network (DHIN) became the first live, statewide health information network in the nation. DHIN currently serves:

- 100% of Delaware’s acute care hospitals
- 100% of Delaware’s long term care and skilled nursing facilities
- Approaching 100% of medical providers who have enrolled and are participating in DHIN

More than 14,000,000 clinical results and reports are posted on DHIN each year – and the total patient records in the system now exceed 3,000,000, featuring patient records from all 50 states.

DHIN has proven its reliability and worth to hospitals, medical professionals and patients throughout Delaware. DHIN securely delivers fast and accurate patient information from hospitals, laboratories, and radiology facilities directly to doctors’ offices.

DHIN makes it possible to deliver higher quality medical care more quickly, and at a lower cost, using a federated data model for medical records, aggregating those records and eliminating the manual transmittal of medical data. Frequent audits confirm that the system is secure and that data is used properly.

The Delaware Health Information Network (DHIN) was enacted by the Delaware General Assembly in 1997 as a public-private partnership for the benefit of all citizens of Delaware to advance the creation of a statewide health information network and to address Delaware's needs for timely, reliable and relevant health care information.

Name: Smartlink Health Solutions
Description:
Smartlink Health offers an Integration Platform-as-a-Service (iPaaS) that has the unique ability to integrate with Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems via the user interface (UI). Smartlink also supports traditional
integration methods like API, HL7, and database.

The healthcare industry has made great strides toward solving its data interoperability challenges, but EHR integrations remain complex, time-consuming, and expensive. Additionally, traditional “backend” integration approaches have vendor-specific limitations regarding the data that can be extracted or inserted and are further limited by providers putting data in the wrong place.  

What makes Smartlink unique is its ability to circumvent all the challenges of EHR integration by extracting and inserting data via the user interface (UI). Our solution, Smartlink Data Connector (SDC), has built-in Robotic Process Automation (RPA) capabilities designed to handle the complexities and behaviors of EHRs. The software logs into an EHR system just like a remote user. From there, it can do anything a user can – insert or extract virtually any type of data, such as documents, discrete data elements, chart notes, images, scheduling, internal messages, tasks, etc.  For example, discrete data such as diagnosis & medications that are available in the HIE but not in the EHR can be added to an upcoming EHR encounter, including a progress note with details.

SDC bypasses the limitations of vendor-specific interpretations of interoperability standards, leaves a complete audit trail of the data accessed, and eliminates the need for EHR vendor
involvement. SDC also requires no involvement from clinic staff or IT department.

If you need a fast and secure way to extract EHR or other system data at scale, or if you’re a solution vendor who shares our vision and values, let’s discuss how we can align to facilitate better clinical and financial outcomes through system integration and process automation. Contact us today!

Billboard Analytics for OOH Advertising Co, News searching for Reporters and lastly Enhanced Mapping to improve map accuracy with current shop names, landmarks.

Our real-time dashcam network addresses the critical need for accurate, immediate road data, transforming transportation efficiency, safety, and analytics.

Name: Forest AI
Description:
The future is AI-centric. As AI reshapes every industry, one of the biggest challenges is knowing which models to trust and which models truly perform. Current evaluation systems are breaking down under data contamination, selective reporting, and biased benchmarks. To ensure real progress (not just hype), we need a validation framework as rigorous as human exams and as transparent as financial audits.

We need a cheat-proof evaluation system that uses sealed execution, rolling item banks, and delayed transparency to ensure fairness and credibility in AI benchmarking. Our mission: to bring integrity back to AI evaluation and lay the foundation for a truly trustworthy, innovation-driven future.

Name: Uplatz SynthLab
Description:
Uplatz SynthLab is a state-of-the-art Synthetic Data Generation Platform that enables organizations to create, manage, and deploy realistic, privacy-safe datasets for AI, machine learning, and advanced analytics. In today’s data-driven world, access to high-quality data is critical — yet real-world data often comes with limitations such as privacy concerns, regulatory restrictions, or imbalance. SynthLab bridges this gap by generating artificially created yet statistically accurate data that mimics the properties and relationships of real datasets, without compromising on security or compliance.

The platform allows users to design fully customizable data schemas, configure complex relationships, and define distribution patterns that reflect real-world behaviors. It supports a wide variety of data types — structured (tables), semi-structured (JSON, XML), and unstructured (text, logs) — making it a versatile solution for data scientists, ML engineers, and enterprise innovation teams. Whether it’s training AI models, validating algorithms, or stress-testing applications, SynthLab ensures that every dataset produced is authentic, bias-controlled, and privacy-compliant.

Powered by advanced statistical modeling and machine learning algorithms, Uplatz SynthLab preserves essential data characteristics such as correlation, variance, and seasonality, enabling realistic simulations of business scenarios. The generated synthetic data is completely free of personally identifiable information (PII), ensuring strict adherence to GDPR, HIPAA, and CCPA regulations while maintaining analytical accuracy.

SynthLab integrates seamlessly into modern data engineering and AI pipelines, allowing direct connectivity to databases, cloud storage, and analytics tools. Its automation and scalability features empower teams to generate massive datasets on demand — ideal for accelerating development cycles, performing hypothesis testing, or benchmarking AI models.

Name: EasyBytes.me
Description:
A platform that aims to provide the luxury of sharing data from one device to another instantly. A user simply has to drop the files and use the barcode to receive those files on another end. It’s that simple. 
It solves two problems, the first one being that users don’t need to deal with annoying wires anymore since it's wireless, and secondly, it works on all operating systems. Platforms like Dropbox and google drive tend to address the same challenge, but with my platform, data transfer is peer-to-peer, which makes my solution swifter, at the same time, respecting data privacy.
It’s also free to use since the main income stream comes from the Ad revenue. Content creators using android phones and windows laptop shares the greatest chunk of my user base, as they find it a challenge to transfer content across their devices seamlessly.
Considering the reviews, I’ve got so far; users are happy with the results and tend to use this service more often. However, to make it sustainable in the future, I’ll be adding more features to make the idea difficult to imitate.

Name: Glyph AI
Description:
GlyphAI is a deep-tech startup founded to solve the fundamental data paradox: information is a critical asset, but in its raw form, it is also a massive liability. We are pioneering the shift from vulnerable data-at-rest to secure meaning-in-motion.

Our platform uses advanced AI to transform raw data into non-reversible semantic symbols. This unique approach delivers transformative outcomes:

Inherent Security: Rendered data is useless to attackers, neutralizing ransomware and insider threats.

Automatic Compliance: Embeds data minimization and privacy (GDPR, HIPAA) directly into the architecture.

Unmatched Efficiency: Achieves 10x+ data compression, drastically cutting storage costs and environmental impact.

Quantum-Resilient: Protects data beyond the cryptographic arms race.

Based in Ireland, GlyphAI is building the new standard for trustworthy, efficient, and intelligent data management. We are hiring visionary engineers and partnering with forward-thinking enterprises.

Name: HDT - Health DataTrust
Description:
Health DataTrust (HDT) is a Health Data Intermediation Service Provider (PSID), specializing in the healthcare sector. HDT is notified by the French Regulatory Authority for Electronic Communications, Postal Services and Print Media Distribution (ARCEP) and is a member of the French Association for Data Intermediation (AID).

We operate as a trusted third party to ensure sovereign, secure, and regulation-compliant health data intermediation, in line with both French and European frameworks. Our role is to build a trust-based environment between data holders and users, compatible with both centralized and decentralized architectures.

We also provide specialized services to facilitate seamless data transactions, including anonymization, pseudonymization, data formatting, data linkage, and traceability of personal data, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and healthcare sector standards.

Our infrastructure is based on high-level interoperability standards, notably those promoted by Gaia-X, ensuring portability, traceability, and security of all data exchanges.

Our services address concrete use cases in research, innovation, and public health. Our dual expertise in healthcare and technology is a key differentiator in supporting the success of our clients’ projects.

We actively contribute to the implementation of European regulations, including the Data Governance Act (DGA), the Data Act, the AI Act, and the development of the European Health Data Space (EHDS).

A Billingpay atende a diversos segmentos e oferece uma ampla gama de serviços, incluindo:

Transporte Público, Semi-Urbano e Rodoviário.

Transporte sob Demanda e Gestão Escolar.

Dispositivos Embarcados (que funcionam como hubs para plataformas operacionais de transporte).

Planejamento e Programação.

Sistema de Gerenciamento de Contratos.

Diferenciais Tecnológicos
As soluções da Billingpay priorizam a eficiência e a inovação. O foco é em uma operação inteligente, colocando a infraestrutura na nuvem, garantindo controle total e economia.

Seus Dispositivos Embarcados (V6) integram múltiplas funções, como:

Pagamento Multimeios Interoperáveis (incluindo Cartões EMV, Cipurse, Mifare, QR code, NFC e Carteiras digitais - ABT).

Controle Operacional e Telemetria.

Videomonitoramento (CFTV e biometria facial).

Para o transporte rodoviário, a ênfase é em uma experiência de consumo simples e acessível para o usuário, abrangendo pesquisa, reserva, compra, antecipação ou adiamento da viagem e embarque.

A Billingpay busca aprimorar a qualidade e trazer transparência ao transporte coletivo, conectando autoridades e operadores, e utilizando relatórios precisos para modernizar o transporte e permitir a remuneração por desempenho.

Name: My Cloud Backup
Description:
In today’s high-tech world with invisible threats all around, ensuring your data is safe is paramount. The threat of data loss has changed from the traditional risk, such as fire or theft, to include those of virus and ransomware. With systems now having to be connected to the internet for almost everything we do – the biggest risk is perhaps that of external attack; Hackers are continually looking for ways to get at your data and their success of recent times is well reported. Putting your backups in the cloud is the first step to protecting your data however, the methodology and where your data resides needs to be considered very carefully.

My Cloud Backup, powered by Veeam software, is the market leader in ensuring your data is fully secure – from the very moment of collection, through to how and where it is stored you can be sure your data will remain your data and should you ever need your data, either in whole or part, then My Cloud Backup, via it’s easy to use web portal will allow fast recovery.

فاب لاب حائل، امتداد لسلسلة فاب لاب العالمية، هو معمل تصنيع رقمي متكامل يقع في كلية علوم وهندسة الحاسب الآلي في جامعة حائل.

ويعد ناديًا يتبع لمركز البرمجيات والتطبيقات الإلكترونية، يهدف إلى تمكين جميع الطلبة من خلال توفير الأدوات والموارد اللازمة لتحويل الأفكار والمفاهيم الإبداعية إلى واقع ملموس.

يحتوي فاب لاب حائل على تقنيات متقدمة، مثل الطابعات ثلاثية الأبعاد ومجموعة متنوعة من المكونات الإلكترونية، مما يوفر بيئة تعليمية عملية تشجع على الابتكار وتطوير المهارات التقنية.

يُعتبر فاب لاب حائل مساحة تعاونية تجمع بين الطلاب والمحترفين والمبتكرين، حيث يمكنهم التجريب وصنع النماذج الأولية وابتكار حلول ومنتجات تقنية جديدة.

من خلال توفير الوصول المفتوح إلى معدات التصنيع المتقدمة والإرشاد المهني، يسعى فاب لاب حائل إلى جعل التكنولوجيا المتقدمة في متناول الجميع، وتشجيع ثقافة الإبداع والتعلم وحل المشكلات.

Name: Vydens
Description:
The Story of VYDENS
In Ancient Rome, videns meant "one who sees" — those rare individuals gifted with vision beyond the ordinary. While others relied on assumptions and guesswork, the videns possessed certainty.
For decades, physical retail has operated blindly. Store owners watch customers come and go, never knowing who they are, what they want, or whether they'll return. Meanwhile, e-commerce platforms see everything — every click, every preference, every opportunity.
VYDENS changes that.
We transform WiFi networks, geolocation, and touchpoints into eyes that see the invisible. No more ghost customers. No more guessing. Just pure, actionable intelligence, powered by AI.
Like the ancient videns, we restore the gift of sight to physical retail.
VYDENS: The AI That Sees It All

Description:
About Trinity Photonics

Founded in 2007 by Dr. Simon Chan and Dr. Dick Chung, Trinity Photonics is headquartered in Hong Kong Science Park. We deliver total solutions—consultation, design, manufacturing, installation, upgrade, testing, and maintenance—for building stable, high-performance optical networks in smart cities and large-scale environments.

Our patented Growable Optical Network enables limitless expansion while maintaining speed and reliability. We've built 70+ super networks using Fiber-to-Everywhere technology, serving 50,000+ users 24/7. These networks support massive wireless access (3,000+ devices/site), E-learning, AI, VR/AR, STEM education, and robotics teleoperation.

We build super networks for:
•   Schools & universities  
•   Hospitals  
•   Hotels  
•   Airports  
•   Malls  
•   AI data centres 
•   Government
•   Smart cities  

Our expert teams excel in fiber installation and advanced integration. Using WDM tech, our networks deliver Terabit+ per fiber, built to last 25+ years.

We proudly support smart cities and digital education with scalable, high-speed optical infrastructure.

 Transforming Adelaide into the Best Education City in the World

In 2022, backed by the South Australian Government, we launched in Adelaide to help transform Adelaide into the Best Education City in the World. Through our AI E-Learning STEM (AES) Platform—powered by proven Hong Kong technologies and new Adelaide-born innovations—we provide the infrastructure and solutions to make this vision a reality.

Together with the SA Government, we co-invented a new patent—an Adelaide Innovation to Serve the World. Please keep an eye on what’s coming next.

At Trinity Photonics, we bring Intelligence by Light to everyone—creating smart, inclusive, future-ready learning environments.
Location: Hong Kong Science Park, Hong Kong

Name: Giilang Consulting Group
Description:
Bio for Giilang Founder - Rachael Macdonald

I am a proud Wiradjuri Woman whose heritage is from the Cowra region. My connection to Country is strong and I am passionate about building my community and creating an environment where we can give back and help others. Living on Yuin Nation land now, through community, Aunts and Uncles, my children and I have learnt who we are, what our heritage is and what connecting to Country really means. 

 

I have spent more than 25 years in both the Public and Private Sectors,  and I have built a reputation as someone who gets the job done. Some of my key strengths lie in building high performing teams to work on major projects, running operational data warehouses, delivering change across the business, and ensuring Executive engagement and buy in. My extensive experience is across administration, technical and business areas. My ability to absorb and process large amounts of information and translate this into language easily understood by Business and Executives has been demonstrated throughout my long career and is a key focus in the data business world. 

 

I have decided to be brave and step up by bringing my heritage and my experience together in the creation of Giilang Consulting Group. Giilang means ‘story’ and my combined heritage and experience positions me to help you through your data journey and create a story worth telling.

Internet teknolojileri, otel, sigorta, emeklilik, ödeme sistemleri, finans ve lojistik sektörlerinde veri merkezi taşıma, cloud, hosting, veri güvenliği, risk yönetimi, altyapı mimarisinin modernize edilmesi, iş sürekliliğinin sağlanması ve regülasyonlara uyum konularında yıllarca çalışmalar yaparak deneyimlerini biriktiren Perovate ekibi, bugün çalışmış olduğu firmalar ile bilgi birikimlerini paylaşarak çözümler sunmaktadır.

Veri merkezini oluşturan server, storage, network ve security ürünleri gibi karmaşık yapılarda mimarinin öğrenilmesi, sistem bağımlılıklarının çıkartılması ve topolojinin hazır hale getirilmesi ile hazırladığımız çalışma neticesinde bulgu risklerine göre çözüm alternatifleri ile müşterilerimizin karar almasını kolaylaştırırız. 

Çalışmalarımızı sadece mevcut sistemler üzerinde değil, yeni kurulan yapılar üzerinde kolaylıkla ölçeklenebilir mimaride uygulayabiliriz. 

Kurum olarak çok yeni olabiliriz fakat ekip olarak kendimizi tecrübeli olarak görüyoruz. Bizi tam anlamıyla yansıttığını düşündüğümüz perovate kelimesi "permanent" ve "innovate" kelimelerinden türetilmiştir. Daimi kalıcılık anlamındadır.

Name: Good Fellas Tech Nology
Description:
Here are key aspects of IT system data services:

1. Data Storage
Database Management Systems (DBMS): Ensuring that data is stored efficiently, either in traditional relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL) or modern NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, Cassandra).
Data Warehousing: Centralized storage of large volumes of structured and unstructured data to enable advanced analytics, reporting, and business intelligence.
Cloud Storage: Leveraging cloud platforms like AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage, or Microsoft Azure Blob Storage for scalable and flexible data storage solutions.
2. Data Integration
ETL (Extract, Transform, Load): Processes to move data between systems, including data cleaning, transformation, and loading into a target system.
APIs: Application programming interfaces that allow different software systems to communicate with each other and share data.
Data Pipelines: Automated workflows for collecting, transforming, and moving data between sources and destinations.
3. Data Security and Privacy
Encryption: Protecting sensitive data both at rest (in storage) and in transit (while being transmitted over networks).
Access Control: Managing user roles and permissions to ensure only authorized users can access specific data.
Data Masking and Anonymization: Ensuring privacy by obfuscating sensitive information for analysis or external sharing.
4. Data Processing
Batch Processing: Handling large volumes of data in bulk at scheduled intervals (e.g., end-of-day processes).
Real-Time Processing: Systems designed to process data instantly as it is generated or received (e.g., stream processing with technologies like Apache Kafka or Apache Flink).
Data Analytics and Machine Learning: Leveraging data to extract insights, build predictive models, or support decision-making using AI/ML frameworks.
5. Data Quality Management
Data Cleansing: Removing inaccuracies, inconsistencies, or incomplete data from datasets.
