Nossos produtos integram análise e ação:

• Pêndulo Digital — índice proprietário (0–100) que consolida dezenas de métricas das redes em um score objetivo, sempre em contexto competitivo, para mostrar quem realmente move o debate. 

• Lupa Social — social listening com IA/NLP para mapear temas, termos/hashtags e posts relevantes, qualificar sentimento (polaridade + intensidade) e detectar tendências, riscos e oportunidades. 

• Pêndulo Press — ranking público mensal que equilibra volume, eficiência e qualidade das interações para comparar players de um mesmo universo.

Como trabalhamos: conectamos múltiplas fontes, estruturamos comparações por universo (pares/concorrentes) e entregamos dashboards em tempo real, relatórios executivos e recomendações práticas para comunicação, conteúdo e posicionamento. Nossas soluções são modulares e podem ser combinadas conforme a sua necessidade.

Onde atuamos: atendimento remoto e presencial a partir de Rio de Janeiro e São Paulo. Fale com a gente para levar inteligência acionável ao seu time — do monitoramento contínuo à tomada de decisão no dia a dia.

Palavras-chave: inteligência de dados, social listening com IA, análise de sentimento, índice de influência digital, performance online, dashboards, benchmarking competitivo, tendências, reputação e opinião pública.

Name: AfDB's Africa Information Highway
Description:
ENHANCING DATA QUALITY, MANAGEMENT AND DISSEMINATION IN AFRICA

The Africa Information Highway (AIH) is an initiative launched by the African Development Bank (AfDB) in 2012 as a response from African Heads of State to urgently support countries in improving their data management and dissemination systems. The AIH involved the installation of an Open Data Platform (ODP) in all 54 African countries and 16 regional and sub-regional organizations to facilitate data collection, management, and dissemination across Africa. Live data links were established between the AfDB and RMCs’ national statistics offices, central banks, and line ministries on the one hand, and development partners, international organizations, and other users, including the general public and the private sector, on the other.

Since then, the AIH has expanded to include collaborations with other partner institutions such as the implementation of the IMF's enhanced General Data Dissemination (e-GDDS) in Africa and dissemination of National Summary Data Pages (NSDPs) through the ODP, as well as the AfDB's recently launched Data Innovation Lab.

Follow us here for the latest information about the AIH, or visit our databases at https://aih.opendataforafrica.org/

Cross App Identification
Cross Channel Identification
Anonymous to Known Identification
Cross Platform Unsubscribe
Data Onboarding
3rd Party App Data Activation

Vous faire gagner de l’argent avec vos habitudes de vie
Nous sommes entourés d’objets connectés, l’IoT. Ces objets seront de plus en plus nombreux dans les années à venir.

Ces données sont captées, exploitées et vendues par des entreprises et des négociants.
Le constat, c’est que ces données :
1- Ne nous appartiennent pas

3- Sont de mauvaise qualité car non structurées et retenues
Dim3 répond à ces problématiques en :
1- Redonnant la propriété de ces données à ceux qui la génèrent

Dim3 est une application mobile qui s’interface avec les applications IoT et objets connectés du quotidien. Dim3 capture la donnée envoyée par les objets connectés choisis, l’enregistre dans un NFT, petit programme numérique correspondant à l’activité.
Vous choisirez d’envoyer votre NFT via une blockchain, pour plus de sécurisation, d’anonymisation et de maîtrise ; jusqu’à notre marketplace ou les données que vous aurez choisies de monétiser seront vendues.
Les entreprises ont besoin de données pour améliorer leurs services, comprendre nos besoins, les chercheurs, les entraîneurs d’intelligence artificielle qui s’en nourrissent. Ils se connectent à notre marketplace, trouvent celles dont ils ont besoin. Name: CURO DATA SOLUTIONS
Description:
CURO DATA SOLUTIONS provides material master data cleansing, consultancy, and governance solutions, delivered through a combination of both software and services. The materials master forms the foundation of inventory, purchasing, and maintenance management processes and systems.

Our data cleaning and enhancement solutions provide a stable long-term cure. We utilize our own software CuroCat which is based on international standards and a substantial technical dictionary and is delivered by a team of experienced professionals. The outputs of the project are consistent and compliant descriptions and duplicate elimination.

Throughout the process, CURO DATA SOLUTIONS standardizes, enhances, and validates raw data to provide a material master that is consistent, attribute-rich, and free of duplication. Once clean, materials data is then formatted to meet the specific configuration requirements of the chosen ERP system, including field type, character limitation and data arrangement.

Legacy data-cleaning addresses one piece of the master data jigsaw. Master data governance is equally essential. Using our standard and highly configurable software, CuroCat, our team of professional’s design, build and implement appropriate master data governance solutions. Our managed service model with the MDG platform CuroCat enables organizations to take control over their inventory, ensure availability of the right MRO part at the right time, and implement efficient data governance. A successful data governance strategy ensures on-going consistent, accurate material master data is created using approved corporate processes, approvals and controls, and that dictionary standards are properly implemented and governed.

Switch to CURO DATA SOLUTIONS Today!

Name: Wares Sp. z o.o.

Naszą misją jest wykorzystanie dostępnej technologii do tworzenia praktycznych rozwiązań dla odbiorców wody i gazu. Tworzymy innowacyjny system, który finalnie przekazuje użytkownikowi informacje o zużyciu wody lub gazu w prostej i czytelnej formie, aby mógł świadomie kształtować swoje zachowania i nawyki korzystania z mediów. Dzięki temu może kontrolować zużycie deficytowego zasobu naturalnego, jakim jest woda lub gaz.
Wares oferuje innowacyjny, inteligentny system zdalnego odczytu dla sieci wodomierzy i gazomierzy, prywatnych, publicznych, dostawców i klientów. Rozwiązanie oparte jest na transmisji danych 5G i wykorzystuje technologie odczytu OCR i TMR. Rozwiązanie można zainstalować w ciągu kilku minut na dowolnym istniejącym liczniku, odczytywać pomiary w czasie rzeczywistym, przekształcać je w dane i przesyłać przez sieć 5G do centralnego repozytorium. W przeciwieństwie do poprzednich rozwiązań, Wares oferuje wykrywanie anomalii sieciowych w oparciu o sztuczną inteligencję i urządzenia działające na bateriach przez ponad 15 lat.

Name: 아이엠디티(iamdt)
Description:
"동물 의료 서비스와 새로운 기술이 만나 행복한 반려 라이프를 만들어 갑니다"

(주)아이엠디티(iamdt)는 동물 의료 데이터를 기반으로 한 펫 헬스케어 플랫폼 기업입니다. 아이엠디티(iamdt)의 풀네임 Integrated Animal Medicine Digital Transformation에서 보듯 우리는 동물 의료 서비스의 통합적 디지털 전환을 목표로 합니다. 이를 위해 아이엠디티는 전국 58개(2022.6 기준) 중대형 동물병원이 모인 국내 최초, 최대의 동물병원 얼라이언스 벳아너스(Vet Honors)와 함께하고 있습니다.

동물병원은 반려동물의 최고 전문가(수의사), 반려동물에 가장 진심인 고객(반려동물 보호자), 독점적 전자의무기록(EMR; Electronic Medical Record) 데이터가 모이는 일한 공간임에도 오랫동안 아픈 동물을 치료하는 제한된 서비스 영역에만 머물러 왔습니다. 우리는 동물병원의 역할을 재정의하고 동물병원 서비스를 개선할 수 있다면, 반려동물 산업 또한 혁신할 수 있다고 믿습니다.

반려동물의 마음을 가장 잘 이해하는 건 보호자이지만, 보호자는 반려동물 전문가가 아니기에 때로는 전문가의 도움을 필요로 합니다. 우리 개에게 맞는 용품은 무엇인지, 어떤 동물보험에 가입해야 하는지, 꼭 필요한 건강관리는 무엇인지 보호자는 궁금합니다. 아이엠디티가 만들어 갈 Cloud EMR, CRM 등 혁신적인 동물병원 건강정보시스템(HIS; Health Information System)으로 모인 양질의 데이터는 보호자의 쉽고 올바른 선택을 도와줄 것입니다.

이미 많은 력 기업들이 파트너이자 투자자로(https://www.news1.kr/articles/?4675120) 아이엠디티의 꿈과 함께하고 있습니다. 내부적으로는 대기업과 스타트업에서 PO와 CTO로서 10년 이상 경력을 밟아온 능한 개발진이 합류하였고, 더 많은 인재를 모시기 위해 노력하고 있습니다. 우리의 목표는 조직 전체의 업무 성과와 구성원 개개인의 성장과 발전을 균형있게 달성하는 것입니다. 이를 위해 자기 주도적인 업무 추진과 수평적인 협업 환경을 만드는데 최선을 다하고 있으며, 사내 복지를 위한 과감한 투자도 이어나갈 예정입니다.

동물 의료 서비스와 새로운 기술의 결합으로 행복한 반려 라이프를 만들겠다는 아이엠디티의 꿈과 함께해주세요. 동물과 사람, 우리는 지금보다 더 행복해질 수 있다고 믿습니다.

Name: Xibalba Solutions Inc.
Description:
At Xibalba Solutions, we are building the future of artificial intelligence by teaching machines a form of digital intuition. While current AI excels at processing information, it lacks the nuanced understanding required for the most complex, high-precision tasks. Our solution is Time-Synchronized Multimodal Datasets.
We are developing high-resolution, high-dimensionality datasets that capture the world in unprecedented detail. By integrating diverse data streams—such as hyperspectral imaging, lidar, 3D scans, and temperature gradients—we use time as the universal constant to synchronize every data point. This approach mimics how human senses work together, allowing our brains to form an intuitive understanding of our surroundings.
By training AI on this rich, unified data, we can unlock a new level of machine intelligence. This will enable AI to perform advanced tasks with superior accuracy and efficiency.
Our initial and most impactful application is robotic surgery. We believe our technology can train the next generation of robotic surgeons to achieve exceptional precision, leading to better patient outcomes and revolutionizing the healthcare industry.
Xibalba Solutions is currently developing a minimum viable product (MVP) to validate market feasibility. We are seeking forward-thinking partners and investors to join us on this transformative journey. If you are interested in pioneering the next evolution of AI, we invite you to connect with us.

Name: BARTRIX
Description:
Bartrix is a skill-barter platform built around a simple idea: everyone has something to offer, and everyone needs something in return. Instead of relying on money, Bartrix creates a structured way for people to exchange skills directly — one person’s expertise traded for another’s.

Think of it as a matrix of talent. Designers, developers, writers, marketers, editors — all connected, all able to help each other grow. You give what you’re good at, and you get what you need. No transactions. Just value for value.

Bartrix makes the exchange easy, transparent, and fair. Whether you're building a project, leveling up, or trying to get something off the ground, you don’t have to do it alone. You tap into a network where skills flow both ways.

This is how we make opportunities more accessible: by turning skills into a shared currency.
We create content that helps aspiring developers understand the fundamentals, build confidence with hands-on experience, and grow into industry-ready professionals. From front-end basics to back-end systems, Learn2Dev is here to guide you step by step.

At the core of our work is a comprehensive Data Annotation and Clean Data engine that prepares accurate, context-rich datasets across image, text, and audio. These datasets power enterprise AI models in computer vision, automation, prediction, and operational intelligence, enabling Vietnamese organizations to deploy AI with confidence.

Powered by a rapidly growing community of mobile Taggers nationwide, we deliver scalable, human-in-the-loop accuracy trusted in real-world conditions. Our Truetag QA pipelines ensure consistency, reliability, and data quality that meet enterprise standards.

As we strengthen Vietnam’s AI data infrastructure, we are laying the groundwork for the next phase: bringing advanced Applied AI and computer vision solutions to sectors such as manufacturing, logistics, field operations, and retail.

When precision, scalability, and real-world relevance matter, Tictag Vietnam delivers the Clean Data that makes AI work.

● Stockage Cloud Sécurisé
Stockez vos données sur des plateformes reconnues (Google Drive, SharePoint, etc.) avec des options personnalisées adaptées à vos besoins.
● Accès Instantané
Accédez à vos documents depuis n’importe quel appareil, n’importe où, avec une interface intuitive et sécurisée.
●Support et Conseil
Bénéficiez d’un accompagnement personnalisé pour intégrer nos solutions dans vos processus existants.

3.Public Cible
Nos services s’adressent à :
● Les PME cherchant à optimiser leurs flux de travail.
● Les cabinets d’avocats et médicaux nécessitant une confidentialité renforcée.
● Les administrations publiques devant respecter des obligations légales strictes.

4.Avantages pour les Clients
● Gain de Temps : Recherche rapide grâce à l’indexation OCR.
● Flexibilité : Solutions adaptées à toutes tailles d’entreprises.
● Paix d’Esprit : Données protégées contre les pertes ou cyberattaques.

Name: Iron City Data Corporation
Description:
Iron City is advancing a robust pipeline of hyperscale and edge data center projects in Pennsylvania that showcase its forward-thinking technology and cutting-edge designs to a growing global market. This pipeline is further strengthened by Iron City’s deep commitment to sustainability—a core strategy that attracts customers seeking innovative, energy-efficient solutions, including green building practices, renewable energy integration, adaptive reuse, and on-site microgrid power. Together, these efforts pave the way toward a smarter, cleaner, and more resilient future for digital infrastructure worldwide.

Iron City's Alignment with PA's vision.
Powering Pennsylvania — and Its Neighbors
Each Iron City site integrates on-site natural gas power generation, increasing Pennsylvania’s energy supply while enhancing regional energy independence. Surplus energy is returned to the PJM grid — reinforcing Pennsylvania’s role as a reliable power exporter during periods of peak demand.
Brownfield Redevelopment That Delivers
Iron City sites span remediated brownfields and legacy industrial zones — from Clarion and Cambria to Midland and Susquehanna. These shovel-ready locations convert environmental liabilities into high-performance digital infrastructure, aligning with DEP revitalization goals and streamlining tax and permitting incentives.
In-State Fabrication & Local Skilled Jobs
Unlike typical developers, Iron City fabricates its modular data centers within Pennsylvania. This in-state manufacturing model boosts industrial employment, shortens supply chains, and supports labor while training the next generation of skilled trades in the digital economy.
Environmental Stewardship by Design
From habitat restoration and soil remediation to LEED-aligned construction and microgrid integration, Iron City’s "greenprint" embeds climate resilience at every phase. The approach echoes Pennsylvania's commitment to land stewardship, ecological integrity, and community health.

 نقدم خدمات شاملة في مجال الحوكمة وإدارة المخاطر والامتثال لمساعدة المؤسسات على تطوير وتنفيذ أطر عمل حوكمة أمنية فعالة، وإدارة المخاطر، وضمان الامتثال للقوانين واللوائح ذات الصلة. يشمل ذلك تطوير السياسات، تقييم المخاطر، ومراجعات الامتثال.
الفوائد: يعزز قدرة المؤسسة على إدارة المخاطر الأمنية، يضمن الامتثال للمتطلبات التنظيمية، ويدعم اتخاذ القرارات الاستراتيجية من خلال ممارسات حوكمة فعالة.

مزود الخدمة المدارة (MSP)
تقوم خدمة  MSPs بإدارة الخوادم أو الشبكات أو التخزين, وتوفر البرامج الحاسوبية كخدمة. وتقدم حلول وخبرات في مجال تكنولوجيا المعلومات لا تستطيع أغلب الشركات الوصول إليها؛  لمنع حدوث مشكلات في نظام العميل أو مساعدة المستخدمين الذين يواجهون صعوبات في الاستخدام.
يتعامل MSPs مع المهام المتكررة, والمعقدة في مجال  إدارة البنية التحتية لتكنولوجيا المعلومات أو أنظمة المستخدم.

Name: Veterinary Terminology and Standards at VMCVM
Description:
We are an interdisciplinary academic, research, and service program within the Office of Research and Graduate Studies and the Department of Biomedical Sciences and Pathobiology of the Virginia-Maryland College of Veterinary Medicine.

We maintain the Veterinary Extension of SNOMED CT (VetSCT).

SNOMED CT is the most comprehensive clinical terminology in use around the world for human medical records. Our lab has worked closely with SNOMED CT for more than 20 years, developing the terminology and ultimately becoming the maintenance organization for the Veterinary Extension of SNOMED CT (VetSCT). It is important for veterinary medicine to maintain a close connection to human and public health, and implementing shared standards like SNOMED CT is a critical aspect of that connection.

We support terminology implementation by veterinary organizations through the following:

- subsetting standardized terminologies
- aligning local terminologies with standardized terminologies
- consulting with organizations on recommendations for implementing standardized terminologies in their systems


We currently maintain terminology subsets for the National Animal Health Laboratory Network, as well as the Small Animal and Equine Problem and Diagnosis Terms subsets that are utilized in many electronic veterinary health records systems.

Name: GP Consultoria- Business Analytics and Intelligence

Description:
In the mid-1980s, the founders of Compaq decided to build a “California-style” campus in the trees along Cypress Creek as their new corporate headquarters for its booming personal computer business. 

Located on 90+ acres, they constructed 15 office buildings, 7 manufacturing facilities, 13 parking garages, a conference center, laboratories, a cafeteria, and more, setting a surprising precedent for locating such a large commercial footprint in the outer suburbs of northwest Houston.

In 2002, Compaq merged its business with Hewlett-Packard which has continued to operate its U.S. operations from this location. Both Compaq and Hewlett-Packard have been an economic boon to our area of Northwest Houston, creating thousands of jobs injecting billions of dollars into the local economy, and spurring an array of new support businesses in the area.

In June 2022, MFI acquired the former HPE/Compaq Computer Campus, giving rise to Viva Center. Today, we've revitalized this facility, harnessing inspiration from its storied past. Channeling the brilliance of its former occupants, we've transformed it into a cutting-edge hub for High-Performance Computing (HPC) Data Center Solutions.

Name: Rocket Fuels Research
Description: Rocket fuels are chemical mixtures typically a fuel and an oxidizer burned to produce the thrust needed for rocket propulsion. They can be classified as liquid, solid, or hybrid, with liquid fuels like kerosene or hydrogen often paired with liquid oxygen for efficient combustion. Advanced fuels such as liquid methane are being adopted for cleaner operations, while traditional options like UDMH and nitrogen tetroxide remain in use for their storability and reliability.

Wakamoso redefines how communities contribute to and benefit from data, acting as a beacon of data democracy and offering a model for the future of sustainable development in South Africa and beyond.

Name: Centrum Systemów Bio-Medycznych sp. z o. o.
Description:
Nasz zespół to wyjątkowe grono specjalistów z dziedziny informatyki, sztucznej inteligencji, diagnostyki medycznej i biznesu. Stworzyliśmy i wdrożyliśmy rozwiązania wspierające diagnostykę obrazową przy pomocy rezonansu magnetycznego, procedur endoskopowych i skanów RTG.

Wspólnie zbudowaliśmy system TYRION - pierwsze na rynku oprogramowanie wspierające śródoperacyjną diagnostykę raka piersi ze zdjęć RTG i trójwymiarowej tomosyntezy.

TYRION pomaga lekarzom odnaleźć obszary, na których może wystąpić nowotwór oraz wskazuje mikrozwapnienia w celu zminimalizowania szans przeoczenia tkanki złośliwej w trakcie operacji. Ponadto, nasz sytem oblicza margines, czyli minimalną odległość między guzem a brzegiem wycięcia, jaka powinna zostać zachowana celem uratowania możliwie największego obszaru zdrowej tkanki pacjentki. To lekarze prowadzący operacje podejmują ostateczne decyzje. TYRION dodaje im pewności, że będą to dobre decyzje.

System został wyszkolony przy pomocy dziesiątek tysięcy śródoperacyjnych zdjęć RTG, na których nasi specjaliści, chirurdzy i onkolodzy, zaznaczali obszary, w których pojawiał się nowotwór. Wszystkie zdjęcia zostały zebrane w polskich szpitalach, z którymi nawiązaliśmy współpracę.

Współpracujemy z wiodącymi ośrodkami klinicznymi w Polsce, Czechach i na Słowacji. Stale szukamy nowych partnerów, dla których najwyższe standardy diagnostyki medycznej są priorytetem i chętnie angażujemy się w nowe projekty.

Name: 株式会社インティメート・マージャー
Description:
「意思決定を、もっとデータドリブンに。」

■目指すビジョン
ビジネスでもプライベートでも、私たち人間は、繰り返し意思決定を求められます。「ユーザーにマッチした広告は何なのか」「恋人にどんなプレゼントを贈れば喜んでもらえるか」――。
このような選択の際、データを用いることで、より正しい意思決定をすることができます。データによって人間の行動を可視化して、最適な提案をする。そんなことが実現できれば、人々の楽しさや幸せに貢献できるのではないでしょうか。

「データによる意思決定を仕組み化して、世の中に広めたい」

この想いこそが、インティメート・マージャーの原点です。

「データ活用をより、誰でも使えるものにしていく」
「利用した価値を実感してもらえるようにする」
「様々な場面で利用できるようにしていく」

データを活用することで、ビジネスや私生活はもっと最適化できる。
私たちはデータエコノミー時代のデータプラットフォーマーNo.1を目指しています。

■当社の強みと実績
株式会社インティメート・マージャーは、毎秒5万件、年間2兆件ほどのデータを自社で開発しているDMPで管理。
日本のインターネット人口の約9割の最新のオーディエンスデータを常に保持しており、国内でもトップクラスのデータ量です。

この高度なデータマネジメントプラットフォーム（DMP）技術を活用し、アドテクノロジー（Ad Tech）およびトランスフォーマティブテクノロジー（X Tech）の領域で業界をリードしています。私たちの技術は、広告主、パブリッシャー、そしてフィンテック企業など、多岐にわたるクライアントに対し最適なデータ駆動ソリューションを提供することを可能にしています。

また、第三者クッキー（3rd Party Cookie）の規制変更に対応するため、先進的なポストCookie技術を用いた製品を提供しています。この技術を活用することで、クライアントはターゲティングの精度を維持しながら、プライバシー規制の要件を満たすことができます。また、国内・海外メディアやSSPといったパートナーと、ポストCookieソリューションを活用した 配信基盤を拡大することで、国内で最大級の広告ネットワークを構築し、広告主にとって価値あるリーチを提供しており、国内では圧倒的なプレゼンスを確立しています。

■今後の事業展開
既存のアドテク基盤技術を活かしながら、X Tech領域への拡大を進めています。これにより、セールス、コマース、ファイナンスなどの新たな市場でビジネスチャンスを広げています。また、昨今技術発展により生成AIの活用が拡大している中、当社のデータを基盤に生成AI時代を見据えたマーケティング支援をスタートさせています。今後も時代に即した課題解決を通して、様々なマーケットにデータの価値を提供していきます。
LinkedIn URL: https://www.linkedin.com/company/株式会社インティメート・マージャー

Name: Bilig Crawl
Description:
Misyonumuz, günümüz dünyasında artık kaçınılmaz bir ihtiyaç haline gelen Türkçe içeriklerin toplanması ve bu sayede akademik ve iş dünyasının Türkçe veri ve içerik eksikliğine destek olmak.

Günümüzde, Hızla gelişen Büyük Dil Modelleri (LLM) teknolojisi ile birlikte, Türkçe içerikler konusunda hem akademik çevreler hem de şirketler için veri bulma süreci zorlu bir hal almıştır.

Gönüllü ekip arkadaşlarımızla birlikte, yasal sınırlar çerçevesinde ve ortaklarımızın içerikleri dahilinde, web üzerindeki tüm Türkçe içerikleri Bilig Crawl sunucularında (ortaklarımız aracılığıyla) saklamayı hedefliyoruz.

Bu süreç, Türkçe veriye ihtiyaç duyan şirketlerin ve akademik çevrelerin araştırma yapmalarına ve kendi ürünlerini geliştirmelerine katkıda bulunacak.

Şu anda, ekip arkadaşları bulma, hukuki yapılanmayı tamamlama, ortaklıklar geliştirme, proje tasarımı, veri işleme hattı (pipeline), doğrulama, kodlama ve mimari tasarım konularına yoğunlaşıyoruz.

Yıllar içinde oluşturacağımız bu kapsamlı veri setinin, birçok eksikliği gidereceğine inanıyoruz.

Hem Türk hem de uluslararası pek çok yeni ekip arkadaşı ve ortaklık eklemeyi planlıyoruz.

Name: Stor Water
Description:
Stor Water is breaking down the barriers to entry for small and medium sized water municipalities to tackle water distribution leakage by providing a Leakage-Detection-as-a-Service (LDaaS).

Stor Water's network operating center (NOC) allows water managers to outsource their remote data optimization to our NOC allowing Stor Water's data scientists to determine when a leak has occurred.  Once a leak has been detected, a Stor Water Acoustic Locating Team will be deployed on sight to determine precise location with acoustic monitoring equipment. 

Stor Water's unwavering commitment to small and medium sized municipalities is backed by the 53% of the US population living outside of large water distribution systems that equate to over 49,000 water distribution systems in the US.

Stor Water's unique offering is shaped by the tight budgets, minimal manpower and long contract cycles.

Steps to Service:
1) Determine state of IT Infrastructure
2) Verify or Build AutoCAD Model
3) Build GIS Model
4) Perform Hydraulic Modeling to determine best future upgrades
5) Centralize all available data (AMI, IoT Pump Data, Well Sights, Etc)
6) Establish Lines of Communications/Responsibility

If you have any questions about how Stor Water can work with your local water municipality, please feel free to reach out.

B2B Lead Generation Services:

There are many reasons why you might want to take a B2B lead generation service. Here are a few of the most common:

To save time: 

Generating leads can be a time-consuming and labor-intensive process. By taking a B2B lead generation service, you can free up your time to focus on other aspects of your business.

To get access to qualified leads: 

B2B lead generation services have access to a large pool of qualified leads that you may not be able to reach on your own. This can save you time and money in the long run.

To get help with lead nurturing: 

B2B lead generation services can help you nurture leads and turn them into customers. This can be a difficult and complex process, but it is essential for growing your business.

To get help with lead scoring: 

B2B lead generation services can help you score leads so that you can prioritize your efforts. This can help you focus on the leads that are most likely to convert.

To get help with lead management: 

B2B lead generation services can help you manage your leads so that you don't lose track of them. This can be important for keeping track of your progress and ensuring that you are following up with leads in a timely manner.

If you are looking for a way to generate more leads for your business, then a B2B lead generation service may be a good option for you. 

However, it is important to choose a reputable service that has a proven track record of success.

"세상을 바꾸는 데이터, 틱택에서 시작됩니다."

틱택은 간편한 태깅을 통해 모두가 데이터에 쉽게 다가가는 세상을 만들기 위해 노력하고 있습니다.

데이터를 가공하기 위해서는 수집 단계에서부터 가공까지 오랜 시간이 소요되며
특히 인공지능이 활용되는 프로젝트에는 큰 비용이 듭니다.
이처럼 고품질의 데이터를 가공하는 것은 가장 중요함과 동시에 가장 어려운 부분입니다.

틱택은 독점적이고 다양한 배경을 가진 크라우드 인적자원을 통해
인공지능 모델을 위한 고품질 데이터셋을 규모에 맞게 합리적인 비용으로 제공하고 있습니다.

자체 개발한 알고리즘의 게임화 된 플랫폼으로
컴퓨터 비전 및 자연어 처리 모델을 위한 데이터에 초점을 맞추고 있으며
데이터 가공을 위한 모바일 App과 웹을 동시에 활용하여
누구나 쉽고 편리하게 데이터에 접근할 수 있는 환경을 조성했습니다.
틱택은 기업이 희귀한 라벨링 데이터에 접근하여 경쟁 우위를 창출할 수 있도록 지원합니다.

틱택은 사회적 취약계층과 고령자 및 소외계층의 인력 참여를 통해
이들에게 경제 활동의 기회를 제공하고 있습니다.
급변하는 글로벌 A.I 마켓에서 모두가 데이터의 이익을 누릴 수 있도록
틱택의 social impact의 가치를 추구하고자 끊임없이 노력하고 있습니다.

틱택은 고객에 따른 맞춤형 데이터 서비스를 제공합니다.

틱택이 지원하는 서비스는 크게 다음과 같습니다 :

이미지 
1. 이미지 라벨링 (Image Labelling)- 바운딩 박스/폴리곤 바운딩/선
2. 이미지 분류 (Image Classification)
3. 속성 태그 (Attribute Tagging)
4. 이미지 전사 (Image Transcription)

텍스트
1. 자연어처리 (NLP)/개체명인식 (NER) 
2. 감정 분석 (Sentiment Analysis)/연관성 분석 (Relevance Analysis)
3. 발화 생성 (Utterance Generation)
4. 기계번역 (Machine Translation)

오디오
1. 오디오 전사 (Audio Transcription)
2. 번역 (Translation)
3. 오디오 수집 (Audio Data Collection)

Name: Verbix.ai
Description:
Verbix.ai is an advanced AI-enabled call analytics platform designed to transform the way organizations measure, manage, and improve customer interactions. Verbix.ai delivers actionable insights that go beyond traditional quality monitoring—empowering contact centers to achieve higher efficiency, compliance, and customer satisfaction.

Key Differentiators & USPs

Agent Performance Scoring
Automatically evaluates every conversation to generate an Agent Score, highlighting strengths and areas for improvement. Managers can track individual and team performance with precision, ensuring objective feedback and targeted coaching.

Call Compliance Monitoring
Ensures that every agent interaction meets regulatory and organizational standards. Verbix.ai flags potential compliance risks in real time—helping businesses stay audit-ready while reducing operational risks.

Conversational Intelligence at Scale
Analyzes 100% of calls (not just random samples) using AI-driven natural language processing (NLP). This allows for a complete, unbiased view of customer sentiment, intent, and experience.

Actionable Insights & Dashboards
Provides real-time dashboards and detailed reports that simplify decision-making. Leaders can quickly identify trends, detect bottlenecks, and measure KPIs across compliance, quality, and customer satisfaction.

Coaching & Training Optimization
Identifies skill gaps and behavioral patterns, enabling managers to deliver data-backed coaching that accelerates agent development and drives consistent performance improvements.

Scalable & Industry-Agnostic
Whether in finance, healthcare, retail, or BPO environments, Verbix.ai adapts seamlessly to industry-specific compliance needs and customer engagement strategies.

Why Verbix.ai?
Unlike traditional call monitoring tools, Verbix.ai combines AI-driven compliance assurance, objective agent scoring, and deep conversational intelligence in one platform.

Name: IT Asset Disposition from Brass Valley
Description:
IT Asset Disposition is the process of either recycling or reselling retired IT equipment with the goal of reusing or recycling as much equipment as possible. 

Understanding our process in 30 seconds: 
When equipment comes to us, we determine if it has any resellable potential. If it can be resold, it is inventoried, data is destroyed, then it is remarketed to a global network of buyers. 
If the equipment cannot be resold, after it is inventoried and data secured, the equipment goes through a disassembly and separation process to separate various commodities like metals, glass, plastics, circuit boards, etc. The commodities are then sent to domestic refineries (processors) where they are shredded, pulverized, smelted, then reclaimed for use as feedstock in new products. This is what is being referred to as the circular economy.

Reporting 
Reporting is an important aspect of our process. Beginning with our Audit Ready  Chain of Custody, our goal in reporting is to give you the information you need for reconciliation, environmental goals, and to fulfill your legal obligations in a timely manner. 

After your equipment reaches us, it is loaded into our online portal that allows you to see the real-time status of your equipment in our process. We offer summary and detail views across all dimensions and reports can be customized to suit specific needs. For example: Job/PO, Location, Product Type, all product attributes, condition/grade, disposition details (scrap/resale), dates; we also have the ability to record customer reference fields at asset and job level, etc. 

Brass Valley has developed a risk management platform that consists of our Audit Ready Chain of CustodyTM, advanced data security practices, environmental management practices, and client based indemnification plan. Taken together, our risk management platform makes Brass Valley the safest choice for your ITAD needs. 

 Direct message us right here on LinkedIn  OR Email sales@brassvalley.com

Name: iSeguros
Description:
O iSeguros é o aplicativo que transforma dados em inteligência para o mercado de seguros brasileiro. Com ele, corretores, seguradoras e profissionais do setor têm acesso fácil e rápido às estatísticas oficiais da SUSEP, organizadas em dashboards interativos, rankings de desempenho e análises detalhadas que ajudam na tomada de decisão.

Nosso propósito é simples: colocar o mercado de seguros na palma da sua mão, oferecendo uma visão clara e prática das informações mais relevantes. Seja para acompanhar o crescimento do setor, comparar a performance de seguradoras, analisar tendências de ramos específicos ou identificar oportunidades de negócio, o iSeguros é a ferramenta certa para quem precisa de dados confiáveis e atualizados.

O aplicativo foi desenvolvido para unir tecnologia, simplicidade e eficiência. Com uma interface moderna e intuitiva, qualquer profissional pode navegar facilmente pelos indicadores e encontrar rapidamente os insights que precisa. Mais do que relatórios estáticos, o iSeguros entrega inteligência de mercado em tempo real, permitindo que cada usuário transforme números em estratégias de crescimento.

Entre os principais recursos, você encontra:

> Dashboards completos com estatísticas da SUSEP.

> Rankings de market share por seguradora, ramo ou linha de negócio.

> Análises de desempenho com comparativos entre períodos.

> Tendências de mercado para apoiar decisões estratégicas.

> Design responsivo e intuitivo, pensado para o dia a dia dos profissionais.

O iSeguros é mais do que um app de consulta, é uma plataforma de apoio estratégico para o setor de seguros. Com ele, você ganha mais visibilidade sobre o mercado, mais confiança para tomar decisões e mais competitividade para se destacar em um setor cada vez mais desafiador.

Com o iSeguros, seguro mesmo é decidir com dados.

Name: TASC
Description:
Traffic Accident Scenario Community (TASC).
VUFO provides access to simulation datasets ("TASC dataset") on a data platform. The TASC dataset is based on real accident data that is converted into simulation files by treating it with specially developed procedures and applying scientific methods. The simulation dataset was created in cooperation with the Fraunhofer IVI (Dresden). It also contains up to 900 variations for each accident, based on a variation approach. The data can be used for statistical analyses or for vehicle and scenario simulations, for example.

TASC dataset
On the one hand, the TASC dataset contains several thousand BASIC SIMULATION FILES. These represent real accident data from Saxony, which are based on data from police accident surveys.

In addition, further VARIATION-SIMULATION-FILES are generated from these BASIC-DATA-SETS by scientifically based methods and variation approaches based on GIDAS-data.

Name: Quantiqun
Description:
We develop quantum and hybrid algorithms designed to address some of the challenges in the medical field—unlocking new possibilities for diagnostics, drug discovery, and personalised treatment.

For the past five years, we have been working on the application of genomic data analysis to detect complex patterns in DNA sequences, enabling more accurate diagnoses and personalised therapies. 

The development of our algorithm is closely aligned with the IG11, developed in 2015, which was designed to enable early-stage disease detection through the continuous monitoring of a patient’s health status. By integrating this genomic framework into our quantum and hybrid algorithm models, we significantly enhance our ability to identify complex patterns in DNA sequences that may signal the onset of diseases before clinical symptoms appear. Leveraging the computational power of quantum technologies, our system accelerates the analysis of high-dimensional genomic data, enabling more accurate, timely, and personalized medical interventions. This alignment positions Quantiqun at the forefront of preventive healthcare, where early detection and precision treatment are key.

Name: Estrategista Solutions | DevHub Trader
Description:
DevHub Trader e Estrategista Trader formam um ecossistema integrado de trading quantitativo, criado para profissionais que tratam o mercado financeiro como um ambiente técnico, mensurável e orientado a processos.

O ecossistema cobre todo o ciclo do trading sistemático: desde a concepção, desenvolvimento e validação de estratégias quantitativas até a entrega de soluções operacionais prontas, automatizadas e escaláveis. A proposta é eliminar decisões baseadas em emoção, improviso ou promessa, substituindo-as por método, dados e governança.

A DevHub Trader atua como o núcleo tecnológico e analítico. É onde estratégias são construídas, testadas e avaliadas com base em métricas reais de performance e risco. A plataforma oferece infraestrutura para desenvolvimento de robôs, análise avançada de resultados, backtests estruturados, ambientes colaborativos e integração com automação e inteligência artificial. O foco é fornecer ferramentas profissionais para quem desenvolve e opera sistemas de trading.

A Estrategista Trader representa a camada de aplicação prática e entrega ao mercado. A partir da base técnica construída no ecossistema, a empresa oferece robôs prontos, desenvolvimento personalizado, portfólios automatizados, copy trade estruturado e soluções voltadas à performance consistente. O objetivo é transformar tecnologia quantitativa em resultados operacionais claros, com controle de risco e visão de longo prazo.

O posicionamento do ecossistema é direto: trading não é aposta, é sistema. Resultados são consequência de processos bem definidos, métricas transparentes e execução disciplinada. Não há espaço para achismo, promessas irreais ou dependência emocional.

DevHub Trader e Estrategista Trader atendem traders, desenvolvedores, operadores independentes e estruturas profissionais que buscam eficiência, escala e maturidade no mercado financeiro, utilizando tecnologia, automação e análise quantitativa como base para decisões sólidas e sustentáveis.

Name: ÁGORA Datalab
Description:
ÁGORA Datalab es un laboratorio especializado en el desarrollo, experimentación y adopción de Espacios de Datos y tecnologías asociadas a la economía del dato. Nuestro objetivo es impulsar un uso responsable, seguro y soberano de los datos como motor de innovación y competitividad en Europa.

En ÁGORA Datalab trabajamos con administraciones públicas, empresas y centros de investigación para:

Diseñar y construir espacios de datos interoperables, basados en estándares europeos como IDSA, Gaia-X y la estrategia europea de datos.

Ofrecer entornos de prueba y demostración (testbeds) que permiten validar arquitecturas, modelos de gobernanza y tecnologías emergentes.

Acompañar la transición digital mediante consultoría estratégica, desarrollo técnico y formación especializada en gestión, compartición y monetización de datos.

Promover la colaboración intersectorial y la creación de ecosistemas donde los datos se utilicen con confianza, trazabilidad y soberanía.

Participamos activamente en iniciativas europeas y nacionales que fortalecen la infraestructura de datos en diversos sectores - agroalimentario, salud, energía, movilidad, medioambiente y administración pública.

Uno de nuestros proyectos destacados es el Espacio de Datos Agroalimentario de Andalucía (EDAAn), una iniciativa pionera que aplica los principios de los espacios de datos al sector agroalimentario, pero forma parte de una red más amplia de proyectos que impulsan la economía del dato en múltiples ámbitos.

En ÁGORA Datalab creemos que los datos son un recurso común que debe gestionarse con confianza, equidad y valor compartido.

Transformamos los datos en conocimiento, y el conocimiento en impacto.

Name: CO2TOKEN
Description:
Somos uma Climatech focada na orginação, certificação e venda de Tokens Ambientais produzidos pelo agronegócio. 

O que é?
Climatech é uma junção das palavras "clima" e "tecnologia". Trata-se de um campo de atuação que busca desenvolver soluções tecnológicas inovadoras para mitigar as mudanças climáticas e promover a sustentabilidade ambiental. Essas soluções abrangem desde a geração de energia limpa até a agricultura de precisão, passando pela gestão inteligente de resíduos e a mobilidade sustentável.

Hoje, a agricultura é responsável por 15% dos gases de efeito estufa globais emissões, mas acreditamos que poderá tornar-se neutro em carbono. A CO2TOKEN ajudará os agricultores sustentáveis a gerar fluxos de receitas adicionais com boas práticas na produção, tecnologias inovadoras e blockachain na cadeia de produtos produzidos pelo agronegócio brasileiro. 

Reunimos especialistas de classe mundial de TI, agronomia e ciências ambientais para ajudar os agricultores a devolver o carbono com maior valor agregado e maior lastro de segurança alimentar. Tudo isso para ajudar de forma sustentável e lucrativa,  os produtores rurais a liderar o mundo em direção a uma natureza mais limpa e a alimentos mais saudáveis. 

O CO2TOKEN permitirá que os agricultores sejam pagos pela originação de créditos sustentáveis, melhoramento na qualidade do seu solo, reduzam insumos e tenham acesso a melhores condições de financiamento e seguros. 

Todos juntos, tornando lucrativa a agricultura neutra em carbono e facilitando o acesso para empresas que precisam compensar sua pegada a neutralizar suas emissões através do nosso modelo de compensação e recompensas.

Venha fazer parte da revolução sustentável do agronegócio brasileiro.

Name: Tendy AI Analytics
Description:
Professional hockey goaltending practitioners rely on subjective evaluations to assess performance. So, Tendy AI uses deep learning applied to 3D reconstruction based on biomechanical principles. The state of the art computer vision algorithms calculate athletic gesture and bodily motions of professional ice hockey goaltenders assisting and correcting movement towards a desired style of play.

We study deeper into the video footage of NHL games, develop machine learning applications that determine inefficiencies or where exactly the goaltender went wrong. IT makes predictions on how movement leading up to the shot can be corrected to result in a save on a similar scoring chance. Visualizations of each goal or undesirable outcome can be magnified to show coaching staff and athlete exactly how to adjust accordingly.

By tracking goalie and puck coordinates 10 times per second, millions of data points go through multiple layers of transformation and enter a machine learning "black box", meaning the analysis process goes beyond human understanding. Thus, creating a perfect goalie benchmark profile and assessing every goalie against it. Adjusting each time for body size and individual's movement capability, our model becomes vastly complex and monitors the unpredictable.

#GoaltendingQuantified #SportsAnalytics

Name: MedhoW
Description:
Hello! My name is Roman. I am an entrepreneur and data science enthusiast.

It has been 25 years since I was diagnosed with Type I Diabetes. To sustain my life, I need to keep track of my body state and calculate my insulin dosage on a daily basis. Not only does it take a lot of time, a mistake can be fatal. I believe that with the modern state of technology and advancements in AI, we can create a service that will improve lives for many people with diabetes including myself.

The most common aspects of everyday life for someone with diabetes are:

- Blood glucose monitoring: Regularly checking blood glucose levels using a glucometer or continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) system.
- Insulin administration: Type 1 diabetics require insulin injections or use an insulin pump to deliver insulin throughout the day.
- Carbohydrate counting and meal planning: Since carbohydrates directly affect blood sugar levels, individuals with Type 1 diabetes often need to count the number of carbohydrates and plan their meals in advance.

Type I Diabetes has been known and researched for a long time. The exact body conditions and the amount of insulin injections vary from person to person, but the main formula stays the same. The differences are mostly in the coefficients, which for many of us have to be found through trial and error and manual calculations.

My team and I are determined to change that. Using data science and innovative software engineering, with the guidance of medical professionals, we want to create a service that will help people with diabetes manage their conditions. The base features will include advanced body monitoring with automatically generated reports and a system for suggesting insulin dosages and meal planning.

Name: URBAN DATALAB
Description:
어반데이터랩은 인공지능과 클라우드형 플랫폼 구축 기술을 기반으로 헬스케어 서비스를 제공하는 기업입니다.

병원과 의료 연구 기관들이 가지고 있는 데이터는 아직 충분히 분석되고, 활용되지 못하고 있습니다. 
이로 인해 환자들과 의료진 모두에게 효율적이지 않은 서비스가 제공되고 있었습니다. 

어반데이터랩은 “이런 중요한 분야에서 기술이 환자와 의료진에게 실질적인 도움이 될 방법은 없을까?”에서 출발했습니다. 

헬스케어 혁신을 위해 어반데이터랩은 기존의 의료 데이터 디지털화, 복잡한 프로세스를 간소화하기 위한 플랫폼 구축 등 다양한 서비스들을 시도하고 있습니다. 

어반데이터랩이 목표로 하는 “모두가 건강한 세상”을 꿈꾸며 함께 새로운 방향으로 나아갈 분들을 기다리고 있겠습니다.

Name: Data Center Services from Brass Valley
Description:
Did you know that a hard drive that was certified as erased can still have sensitive data on it? If you didn’t, don’t feel bad, most of our competitors don’t know it either. 

The challenge of data center decommissioning is the challenge of data security and preventing a mega breach. Because of this the security requirements in a data center are much more stringent and they require specialized knowledge with data destruction in storage arrays, servers, and networking devices. This is a niche specialty possessed by very few in the IT Asset Disposition market. 

Brass Valley has been working primarily with Data Centers - without a single data security or environmental incident since 2002. We were the first to develop an embedded media practice to help our clients minimize their attack surfaces and we expanded our capabilities to serve our clients on a global basis in 2020. 

Brass Valley has full data center decommissioning capabilites from the rack to point of demarcation. But while we’re at your facility we can do even more. We can also help with technology deployments including rack and stack, cabling, and ad hoc services. We are a one stop shop for your data center upgrade and decommissioning needs. 


So if you didn’t know that hard drives can be certified as erased and still have data on 
them, or you might like to work with a company that thinks outside of the box, we’d love 
to hear from you, contact us today. 

 Direct message us right here on LinkedIn  OR Email sales@brassvalley.com

Name: (주)KAFLIX (제주패스)
Description:
우리는 이렇게 일해요!

하나. 고객에게 집착하고, 관찰하여 서비스를 만들어갑니다.
고객과 시장에 대한 관찰이 가장 중요합니다.  매사 꾸준히 관찰하고 학습하며, 실행하고, 분석하고, 피봇하는 습관을 가지고 있습니다.   

둘. 동료를 존중하며 함께 목표를 향해 달려갑니다.
존중받는 동료가 일을 즐깁니다. 공동체를 위해 예의를 갖추고 함께 즐기며 일을 할 수 있는 환경을 만들기 위해 노력합니다.

셋. 우리는 비전과 미션을 공하며, 의사결정에 필요한 모든 정보를 공하며 소통합니다.
수평적인 소통을 위해 영어 이름을 쓰고 매월 모두가 함께 목표를 점검하여 일합니다.
또한 협업툴을 위해 진행하는 프로젝트를 투명하게 공개하며 소통하는 문화를 만들고 있습니다. 

넷. 완벽함보다 더 나은 것은 신속함입니다.
캐플릭스는 가장 성공한 회사이기보다 가장 편하게 실패할 수 있는 회사입니다. 빠르게 시도해보고 다시 고객과 시장의 반응을 살핀 후 완성도를 높이는 업무 방식(애자일)을 선호합니다. 

모빌리티는 이제 우리의 삶에서 중요한 부분이 되었습니다. 캐플릭스는 단순한 이동의 개념보다 폭넓은 가치를 선사합니다.

그렇게 “모빌리티”라는 개념은  캐플릭스에게 다양하게 해석됩니다.

빅데이터에서 사소한 움직임을 발견하고, 급변하는 디지털 시대에 동적으로 진화하며, 핵심 기술의 기동력으로 더 나은 소비자의 여행을 제안합니다.

모빌리티는 캐플릭스의 시작과 끝이 아닌, 그 사이에 담긴 여정(Journey)입니다.

Name: The King Repairs - Data Recovery Oklahoma City
Description:
We specialize in getting your data back when you think it's too late!
Whether you accidentally reformatted your computer, spilled water on
it, or your hard drive finally gave out, we can help you.

Bring in your broken external drives to get pictures and documents
off them; old laptops and computers which hold value to you.
We will save your information before it's too late.

Our Data Recovery experts develop and utilize our own programs to
better aid us in recovering data. They also share with the public
tools to keep your Hard Drive healthy, and know when it is failing
before it's too late. You can find these programs on our Store.

While we feel that patience is a virtue and not to rush things,
we recover data efficiently and have great success at fixing
corruption in data. Nothing is truly lost until you decide it's
not worth the effort. We are here to give you back your life, and
peace of mind. You can find our data recovery centers near you,
or carefully ship your device to us.

The first thing we do when a device or hard drive comes in, is to
make a copy of the original. This allows us to backtrack and try
multiple methods in the process of recovering data from your drive.
Bit for bit under a strictly reading operation, we verify no data
has been changed in the backup, or on the original.

Cloning is half the battle, and may take anywhere from hours to
days in order to complete. Not only does this give us a copy of
the data to work with, but improves the speed of recovery from a
healthy drive disk. We use various tactics to coax damaged hard
drives into staying alive long enough for us to get data off them.
These tools and methods prove invaluable when recovering information.

So much has been lost to time, but you data doesn't need to be.
Call us today to schedule an appointment in discussing your
situation and available options. We will help you recover back
lost treasures, work documents, videos and more!

נעים להכיר, אנחנו "מסירה כדין". אם חשבתם שהגעתם לעוד חברת שליחויות משפטית – תחשבו שוב. הקמנו את "מסירה כדין" במטרה אחת: לחולל מהפכה טכנולוגית באופן שבו הציבור, עורכי הדין וחברות הלוגיסטיקה צורכים ומספקים שירותים.

פיתחנו פלטפורמה היברידית המשלבת טכנולוגיה מתקדמת, בינה מלאכותית (AI) ורשת אנושית, כדי לתת מענה 360 לכל צורך בירוקרטי או משפטי:

 1. זירת המכרזים המשפטית (Marketplace) אנחנו משנים את חוקי המשחק בחיבור בין לקוחות לעורכי דין. במקום לחפש בנרות, הלקוח פותח "מכרז תיק" במערכת, ועורכי הדין הטובים ביותר מתחרים ומגישים לו הצעות מחיר מותאמות אישית. שקיפות, מהירות ויעילות.

 2. טכנולוגיה וניהול חכם (SaaS & AI) המערכת שלנו היא כלי עבודה עוצמתי. החל מ-CRM ייחודי לניהול לקוחות, דרך עוזר אישי מבוסס AI שמייעל תהליכים, ועד האפשרות לחברות שליחויות חיצוניות להתחבר למערכת, לקבל הזמנות באזורי החלוקה שלהן ואפילו להקים מערכת "White Label" עצמאית לעסק שלהן.

ה 3. מעטפת שירותים בירוקרטיים מורחבת אנחנו One-Stop-Shop אמיתי. מעבר למסירות משפטיות והגשות, אנו מטפלים במגוון רחב של שירותים לפרטיים ולעסקים:

סיוע בהוצאת רישיון נשק והחזרי מס.

איתורי חייבים וחקירות כלכליות.

שירותי תמלול, הכנת מסמכים ותמיכה משרדית.

מסירות משפטיות ופתרונות לוגיסטיים מורכבים.

החזון שלנו להנגיש, לייעל ולהפוך את העולם המשפטי והבירוקרטי לדיגיטלי, חכם ופשוט. אנחנו כאן כדי לחבר בין אנשים, טכנולוגיה ושירות.

Name: AI ThoughtStream
Description:
This application enables end-to-end AI-driven content generation and seamless publishing on LinkedIn. The workflow consists of intelligent agents collaborating to produce high-quality articles in the field of Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Machine Learning, complete with visualizations and social-ready summaries.

Key Workflow Stages
Topic Identification

If the user hasn't specified a topic, the app generates a trending AI/ML topic using a topic scout agent.

Otherwise, it uses the user-defined custom topic.

Research & Summarization

A research agent gathers key facts, statistics, and context from reliable AI sources.

The summary includes 3–5 well-structured insights.

Technical Article Writing

A writing agent composes a clear, engaging article (~300–800 words) from the research.

The content includes an intro, detailed body sections, and a conclusion.

Visualization Generation

A visual agent creates Python code using matplotlib to produce contextual data visuals.

These are executed and displayed dynamically in the UI.

Social Media Post Creation

A social copywriter agent distills the article into a 150–200 word LinkedIn post with hashtags and a call to action.

 LinkedIn Authentication & Auto-Posting

Users authenticate via LinkedIn OAuth (handled within the app UI).

Once authenticated, the final LinkedIn post is published directly to the user’s feed using the LinkedIn API.

Export Options

Users can download the full article as a PDF or copy it to clipboard.

Visualizations are also saved as image files.

 Technologies Used
Streamlit – Interactive UI and user controls

CrewAI + LangChain – Multi-agent orchestration & LLM-powered task execution

OpenAI GPT-4 – Core language model for topic generation, research, writing, and posting

LinkedIn API (OAuth + UGC) – Social media publishing integration

Matplotlib – Data visualization rendering

Python – Backend logic, REST handling, and agent coordination

 Outcome
A fully automated tool that:

Data Citadel olarak, Türkiye'deki ihracat ve ithalat yapan firmalara, kamu kurumlarına, danışmanlık şirketlerine ve akademik kurumlara yönelik kapsamlı ve özelleştirilmiş veri çözümleri sunuyoruz. Misyonumuz, müşterilerimizin stratejik kararlarını desteklemek için güvenilir, güncel ve doğru veri sağlamaktır.

Hizmetlerimiz arasında pazar analizleri, sektörel raporlar, ihracat ve ithalat verileri, rakip analizleri, veri görselleştirme ve özelleştirilmiş veri çözümleri yer almaktadır. Kullanıcı dostu platformumuz, gerçek zamanlı veri güncellemeleri ve detaylı analizlerle müşterilerimize veriye hızlı ve etkin erişim imkanı sunar.

Veri güvenliği ve gizliliği önceliğimizdir. Güvenli veri depolama ve erişim çözümlerimizle müşterilerimizin verilerini koruruz. Ayrıca, 7/24 müşteri desteği ve danışmanlık hizmetlerimizle müşteri memnuniyetini en üst seviyede tutarız.

Esnek ve rekabetçi fiyatlandırma politikamızla, farklı bütçelere uygun çözümler sunarak geniş bir müşteri kitlesine hitap ederiz. Teknolojik altyapımız ve sürekli inovasyon yaklaşımımızla hizmetlerimizi sürekli geliştiriyor ve yenilikçi çözümler üretiyoruz.

Name: MDD 2002 Kft. gyógyszeradatbázis, orvosi szoftverek
Description:
Gyógyszeradatbázis - MDD magánorvosi szoftver
RP-info gyógyszer-információs szoftver

MDD gyógyszeradatbázis
Az MDD 2002 Kft. több mint két évtizede foglalkozik a hivatalos gyógyszeradatbázis szakértői továbbfejlesztésével. Több kórházi rendszerhez – többek között az ESZFK által üzemeltetett kórházi rendszerekhez is ‒ cégünk biztosítja a naprakész gyógyszeradatokat. 
A Magyar Orvosi Kamara több évtizeden keresztül díjmentesen biztosította az orvosoknak az egyedülálló RP-info gyógyszer-információs rendszerünket, amely naprakészen rendszerezi a gyógyszeradatokat, rendeleteket, jogszabályokat és protokollokat. 
 
Vállalkozásunk célja, hogy egységes adatbázisba rendszerezze, és szakmai információkkal kiegészítse a Magyarországon forgalomban lévő gyógyszerek és gyógytermékek adatait. Adatbázisaink egyaránt szolgálnak információval az egészségügyi szakma (pl.: háziorvosok, magánorvosok, szakrendelők, kórházak, patikák) és a laikus közönség számára (pl.: drinfo.hu).
Gyógyszeradatbázisunk teljesen egyedülálló kölcsönhatás-vizsgáló modullal rendelkezik. Gyógyszer-információs rendszerünk az összes nagy nemzetközi tudományos forrás alapján biztosítja a kölcsönhatások ellenőrzését, az enzimszintű kölcsönhatásokat is. Rendszerünkben a BNO diagnózishoz kötött javallatok a teljes gyógyszerkörre elérhetőek.

MDD magánorvosi szoftver
Kiemelkedő orvosszakmai tartalom, kedvező ár, sokoldalúság, EESZT elérés, segítőkész ügyfélszolgálat, egyszerű kezelhetőség! – Ezek jellemzik leginkább az egyik legsokoldalúbb MDD magánorvosi szoftvert, amely folyamatosan követi a jogszabályi változásokat és a magánorvosi igényeket. A szoftvert az illetékes hatóságok minősítették, megfelel az összes jogszabályi előírásnak.

RP-info gyógyszer-információs szoftver
Az RP-info egy orvosok számára kifejlesztett egyedülálló gyógyszer-információs rendszer, amely a betegellátás során felmerülő szakmai kérdések gyors megválaszolásában igyekszik segítséget nyújtani.

Name: Simple Tech Co.
Description:
Simple Tech Co. provides data organizing and digital decluttering services. It’s a new kind of company born in the era of overwhelming amounts of data. Just like with your physical possessions, your data is valuable, but can be just as unorganized and out of control. Cluttered digital spaces can lead to daily stressful experiences, as clutter bombards your brain with an overwhelming amount visual stimuli that causes our senses to work overtime. Sure, you can just close the laptop and walk away. But we’re here to offer a more long term, organized solution. 
Good digital hygiene practices can enhance your productivity while establishing a sense of peace and ease when using modern technology. Introducing them may help prevent hacking or identity theft, reduce addictive behaviors like constantly checking email or social media, and allow more bandwidth to focus on other things in the physical world. 
Think of us as the Marie Kondo of the digital world: we help you declutter and reimagine the digital spaces that you live in. We assess your digital footprint by asking key on-boarding questions about where and how you’re keeping up with your data. Then, we help you simplify and organize, taking into account your personal needs.

Name: ComplyOnce
Description:
ComplyOnce is compliance, trust, and security infrastructure built around the individual. One verified Vault connects people and services through the X-Road secure data exchange protocol — cutting costs, risk, and friction.

ComplyOnce rebuilds compliance from the ground up — replacing today’s siloed, service-centric verification systems with one unified, proof-based infrastructure for both individuals and companies.

Each user or organisation operates through a personal or corporate KYC Vault, created with national digital identity and verified once.

The Vault functions as a secure Single Sign-On (SSO) trust anchor, allowing instant, verified access to services without passwords or repeated onboarding. Its Incognito Mode SSO allows users to prove attributes such as age only without revealing personal details — ideal for age-restricted and privacy-sensitive services.

Data exchange takes place over the X-Road secure data-exchange protocol, ensuring encrypted, authenticated, and auditable communication — replacing risk-prone legacy channels such as e-mail and SMS.

By eliminating data duplication and manual verification, ComplyOnce reduces lifecycle compliance costs by up to 70%, while raising security and transparency for regulators.

Age-restricted and regulated services gain simple “incognito proof of age” functionality, without storing personal data.

Aligned with GDPR, eIDAS2, DORA, AMLD6, and MiCA, ComplyOnce positions itself as the trust layer for the digital economy — connecting people, companies, and regulators through one interoperable infrastructure.

Once Only. Always Secure. ComplyOnce.

What we do:
1. Systematic strategy research and development
2. Strategy evaluation and validation frameworks
3. Risk-aware trading system design
4. Platform-agnostic strategy engineering
Our approach explicitly accounts for:
1. Transaction costs and slippage
2. Liquidity and lot-size constraints
3. Regime shifts and drawdown behavior

Virexan Capital does not engage in signal selling, guaranteed return schemes, or marketing-driven trading products.

We are open to technical discussions around strategy design, research methodology, and trading system architecture.

Name: Uplatz GovernAI
Description:
Uplatz GovernAI is an advanced, AI-powered Data and AI Governance Platform that helps organizations manage, secure, and trust their data and artificial intelligence systems with confidence. It unifies data governance, AI ethics, compliance, and operational control into one intelligent framework — empowering enterprises to innovate responsibly in the age of AI.

Beyond traditional data governance, GovernAI establishes strong guardrails for AI usage, consumption, and implementation, ensuring every stage of the AI lifecycle — from data ingestion to model deployment — adheres to principles of transparency, accountability, and fairness. The platform enables enterprises to monitor how AI systems are built, trained, and used, preventing bias, misuse, and non-compliance through automated controls and ethical oversight.

At its core, GovernAI integrates metadata management, lineage tracking, data quality, and access control with cutting-edge AI governance features such as model explainability, responsible AI auditing, and policy-based orchestration. It empowers data stewards, engineers, and business leaders to collaborate within a single ecosystem that promotes data democratization without compromising trust or compliance.

With AI-driven discovery, intelligent policy enforcement, and real-time observability, GovernAI ensures adherence to evolving global regulations including GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, and the EU AI Act. Its cloud-native, scalable design integrates seamlessly with modern data and MLOps architectures, enabling organizations to operationalize governance across hybrid and multi-cloud environments.

Uplatz GovernAI is more than a platform — it’s a mission to govern intelligence responsibly, transforming compliance into confidence and ethics into enterprise value.

Medical Dataway AG is a Swiss startup unlocking the potential of AI for surgery. Leveraging both its expertise in machine learning and access to a large data pool of surgical videos, Medical Dataway has developed a revolutionary technology in computer vision for medical imaging.      
     
Medical Dataway’s visual foundation models specialized in medical and surgical videos and other forms of imaging, add “eyes” to surgical robots and surgical devices. The product line SurgEye provides them with real-time feedback applications supporting surgeons directly during surgeries. In 2024 Medical Dataway will present pilot products for enhanced intraoperative visualization and in 2025 risk detection/alert systems for (robot/device-assisted) surgeries.     
                                                                           
In addition, the post-analytic software MDW Copilot enables young surgeons to improve their skills and experienced surgeons to optimize surgical processes. MDW Copilot combines a series of applications, such as auto-phasing, auto-protocolling, auto-surgical tool tracking and auto-comparison with benchmarks.      
                                                       
With SurgEye and MDW Copilot Medical Dataway will bring Cambrian Explosion to the surgery world.

Conectamos soluções, impulsionamos negócios.

Há mais de 20 anos no mercado, a Center Soluções Digitais é fruto do Know-how e experiência adquiridos por seu fundador, Andherson Simões, como técnico na renomada empresa Xerox do Brasil.

Após ter acesso a diversos treinamentos e aprimorar suas habilidades, Andherson decidiu abrir seu negócio em 1998, tornando-se um empreendimento multimarcas em busca de novos horizontes.

Soluções Integradas e inovadoras



Iniciamos nossa trajetória como Center Cópias Cruzeiro, prestando serviços de gráfica rápida e realizando algumas locações. Entretanto, diante do avanço e da crescente demanda por outsourcing de impressão, decidimos nos reinventar e nos tornar a Center Cópias Soluções Digitais. Em 2019, vendemos a unidade onde se situava a Gráfica Rápida e passamos a nos dedicar exclusivamente às soluções digitais, agregando novos produtos e serviços ao nosso portfólio.

Atualmente, estamos em um processo de transformação removendo a palavra “Cópias” de nosso nome, pois entendemos que somos parte de soluções completas para nossos clientes. Dessa forma, oferecemos não apenas outsourcing de impressão, mas também contratos de TI para empresas, automação comercial, venda de impressoras, scanners e toners. Além disso, disponibilizamos um sistema revolucionário de ponto em nuvem, facilitando o fechamento e a administração do RH de nossos parceiros.

Name: 4cues.ai
Description:
4CUES.ai is at the forefront of manufacturing digitization with our unique cognitive assistant. Our cognitive assistant, or copilot, integrates critical process information such as plant and quality analytics, operating procedures with factory documentation and (tacit) knowledge that is captured from workers.

Our solution is an intelligent cognitive assistant for the manufacturing sector powered by Large Language Models (LLMs). Operators interact with the copilot which provides them with context-dependent quality/productivity recommendations boosting operational excellence. The smart knowledge recommendations reduce training and upskilling time. Whether you’re a fast-growing start-up or a global enterprise, Immutably is your safety net, compliance partner, and recovery lifeline, all rolled into one.

Our Mission

At Immutably, our mission is simple: to make data protection effortless, resilient, and accessible for every organisation. We believe that safeguarding data should never get in the way of innovation—and that’s why our laser focus on backup and recovery excellence drives everything we do.

We’re committed to giving organisations the confidence that their information is always protected, always compliant, and always recoverable. By continuously evolving and pushing the boundaries of what backup can be, Immutably stands apart—helping businesses thrive in a world where resilience is non-negotiable.

Nós existimos para mudar isso.

O VAI conecta veículos, motoristas e operação em uma única camada de inteligência, transformando dados brutos em informações estratégicas para a tomada de decisão. Aqui, o movimento vira dado. O risco vira previsão. O imprevisto vira informação.

Nossa plataforma permite acompanhar a frota em tempo real, automatizar rotinas operacionais, identificar gargalos, monitorar manutenção por tempo e quilometragem, detectar eventos não planejados e antecipar situações que geram custo, desgaste e perda de eficiência.

Mais do que monitorar veículos, o VAI entrega controle sem microgerenciamento, gestão sem achismo e decisões baseadas em dados confiáveis. Tudo de forma simples, integrada e escalável, respeitando a operação e reduzindo fricções no dia a dia das equipes.

Com tecnologia própria, telemetria avançada, automação de processos e análises inteligentes, ajudamos locadoras e frotas corporativas a operar com mais previsibilidade, segurança financeira e eficiência operacional.

VAI
Do achismo à decisão.
Da reação à prevenção.
Do dado à gestão inteligente de frotas.

Your content is only as impactful as the architecture that collects, manages and distributes it, and the way that you shape and organize it will determine how clearly and how far the idea will travel. Mocky skapades för att vara motsatsen till de tunga systemen. En plattform som inte kräver konsulter eller stora investeringar. Betyder det att vi tummat på kvaliteten? Absolut inte. Tack vare grundarnas erfarenheter har Mocky byggts med fokus på det som företag faktiskt behöver – inget mer, inget mindre.

JobRonin is a Chrome-extension of AI agents that turns any live job brief into a daily feed of sales-ready leads.

Name: ATTC.AI
Description:
ATTC - Collaborative AI Inference Solutions

Welcome to ATTC, where we're reshaping the future of large language model (LLM) access! Our mission at ATTC is to transform the field of natural language processing (NLP) by providing an advanced distributd platform that makes state-of-the-art models accessible to researchers, developers, and practitioners globally. With our innovative system, users can collaboratively perform inference and fine-tuning of large language models, overcoming the traditional barriers of high-end hardware requirements.

About Us:

At ATTC, we understand the game-changing potential of large language models, boasting over 100 billion parameters. While the release of models like BLOOM-176B, OPT-175B, and the recent Mistral 8X7B has opened new possibilities, the associated hardware demands have limited widespread use. This is where ATTC steps in with a groundbreaking solution, leveraging collaborative resources from multiple parties to enable efficient deployment and fine-tuning of large models.

Key Features:

Collaborative Inference: ATTC enables multiple users to collaborate on inference and fine-tuning, maximizing resource utilization over the Internet.

Flexible Fine-Tuning: Our platform supports efficient training methods like adapters and prompt tuning, allowing users to adapt models to specific tasks without extensive hardware requirements.

User-Friendly Interface: ATTC provides a seamless interface for both inference and fine-tuning, making it easy for researchers and developers to interact with and adapt LLMs.

Security and Privacy:

While prioritizing security and privacy, ATTC encourages users working with sensitive data to limit clients to trusted servers or set up isolated ATTC swarms. Future updates may address privacy concerns using secure multi-party computing or privacy-preserving hardware.

Join us at ATTC, where the language of innovation flourishes!

Name: HYNOONTECH
Description:
We specialize in reducing data volumes by an average of 45% or more through advanced compression and filtering techniques using industry-leading LogStream tools.
Key Capabilities:
•	Volume Reduction: Expertise in optimizing log data pipelines to minimize data sent to downstream systems, resulting in significant storage and cost savings.
•	Intelligent Filtering: Ability to filter events based on metadata, content, or a combination of both, ensuring only relevant and actionable data is retained.
•	Tool Proficiency: Deep experience with LogStream and related data optimization technologies, enabling seamless integration into existing environments.
Value Proposition:
By streamlining data flows and reducing volume at the source, we help organizations improve system performance, lower operational costs, and gain faster insights from their data.

Data reduction comes in two primary forms: 
1.	reducing the overall number of events, and 
2.	reducing the size of the events themselves.

Reducing event count is done by dropping, sampling, or suppressing events.  
•	Dropping events– 100% of this type of data is discarded.
•	Sampling events– 1 out of N of this type of data is delivered, the rest is discarded.
•	Dynamic sampling– low volume data of this type is delivered at 100%, but as volume increases the % of dropped data increases. 
•	Suppression– no more than N copies of this type of data is delivered per unit of time.

With each of these methods, we can specify the matching criteria to be used; meta information such as hostname, source, sourcetype, log level, in combination with content extracted from the events themselves.

Name: Value Recovery From Brass Valley
Description:
The risk-free way to recover the true value of your retired IT assets. No-one works harder than our brokerage team!

One of the differences in ITAD companies is their ability to effectively remarket retired IT equipment. Our clients depend on our asset remarketing capabilities to meet their ROI and TCO goals. We take pride in our ability to get competitive pricing for all the equipment that is eligible for resale. 

How does the process work

Step 1: Collect and categorize the equipment: 
After going through the inventory and data security process the equipment is graded on 
functional and cosmetic scales then prepared for resale. 

Over 20 years of experience has allowed us to develop buying markets in a broad range of equipment types:

Edge Computing:
Desktops, Laptops, Peripherals, Mobile

Core Computing:
Servers, Storage, Networking

Specialty:
Broadcast, Test and Measurement 

Step 2 Building packages for resale:
In this phase, we package the products in lots (wholesale) or individually (retail) to make them attractive for resale. Understanding how lots can be packaged is a skill that can make a big difference in the overall resale value of the products.

Step 3 The bidding process:
The goal with everything we sell is to create a competitive bidding environment for your 
equipment. Our brokerage team uses auctions, email blasts, phone outreach, specialty websites, and retail outlets on a domestic and global scale to create as much demand as possible for each item. 

Step 4 Sale complete:
 When the sale is completed, our clients can see their settlements real time in our online 
portal. Settlement reports are generated for each lot that we process. 
 
The resale process presents one of the biggest challenges for ITAD data security & is one of the most common points of data breach. Learn how we deliver the highest level of data & environmental security services in the ITAD industry

 Direct message us right here on LinkedIn  OR Email sales@brassvalley.com

Name: Risk Management from Brass Valley
Description:
The sad truth is the ITAD industry is riddled with misunderstandings, untruths and ‘gotchas’ that nobody else in ITAD is talking about. These leave unsuspecting organizations exposed to risks hidden in plain sight! Your solution comes in two parts - Prevention and Defense.

Sadly, most ITAD companies fall short in both prevention and defense. Leaving their clients at risk, unnecessarily.

Most ITAD companies wave 3rd party certifications at you and allow you to believe you're covered and everything will be okay. But it’s not enough. Here’s why:

 You are liable. Always - you are responsible for the stewardship of your IT equipment and the data even after it leaves your possession. Cradle to grave!

 Your spent IT assets are Universal Waste - when something goes wrong you can be prosecuted for hazardous waste violations under RCRA and CERCLA.

 Risk exposure beyond the HD - encryption has limitations, remote monitoring hardware and embedded media pose hidden threats nobody tells you about.

 Your chain of custody may be weak - regulatory guidance for a proper chain of custody is limited. This leads to a wide variety of interpretations from ITAD service providers. They can't all be right…

How can your ITAD risk be managed comprehensively?

If your organization deserves an ITAD vendor that takes the risk of data breach and environmental incidents as seriously as you… perhaps you’d be open to discussing a solution that embraces Prevention and Defense?

 Direct message us right here on LinkedIn  OR Email sales@brassvalley.com

This led to vast financial damage, high public scrutiny, negative media coverage and severe regulatory issues. It also helped enable various online scams, human trafficking, child pornography, and endangered species hunting.

We aim to put a stop to that. We are a multi-disciplinary team of seasoned fraud fighters and we will aggregate the account opening data of both legitimate users and fraudsters, as well as external data sources and social footprints to build a never seen before product portfolio:

prediktivConnect - Connecting financial institutions to enrich a common knowledge base of suspicious data

prediktivAssess - Most efficient way to combine all available data sources on the market to prevent identity fraud

prediktivAggregate - Preventing new types of fraud in emerging markets

Name: HOAfiling.com
Description:
The Corporate Transparency Act (CTA) is a new regulation requiring U.S.
organizations to file Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI) reports with the Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN). This regulation applies to most Homeowners Associations (HOAs) and Condominium Associations. Associations must file with FinCEN before January 1st, 2025 or they will potentially incur $500 daily fines. 

HOAfiling.com is built and managed by seasoned Association Operators with over 50 years of experience in the HOA Industry. We have built a platform that allows associations to easily file their Beneficial Ownership information in minutes. Associations can file and make updates to their filing throughout the year to always stay compliant with the Corporate Transparency Act. 

HOAfiling.com also provides an elegant solution for Association Management Companies to manage the filings of their associations in one easy-to-use dashboard.

Name: next-stay
Description:
Med 20 års erfaring, kender vi behovene bag næsten enhver form for udlejningsvirksomhed. Med den viden som ballast, har vi udviklet et 100% web- og cloudbaseret administrations- og bookingsystem. Stabilitet og hastighed har haft topprioritet under hele udviklingsprocessen. Alt overvåges løbende, og vi griber ind inden en udfordring bliver til et problem for dig. 

Vores nye platform er designet med enkelhed i tankerne. Vi fokuserer på at levere den bedste og mest intuitive mulige oplevelse for dig og dine gæster.  

Hvorfor nu next-stay ”beyond booking” i vores nye logo! 

Ganske enkelt fordi vi i efteråret 2022 opstod som full-service leverandør. Hvor vi nu udover integrationer til øvrige udbydere, også kan levere komplette hardwareløsninger med egen integreret adgangskontrol, nummerpladegenkendelse, el-standere, intelligent forbrugsstyring, dørlåse, samt automatisk booking og check-in skærm. 

Via disse systemer kan dine gæster faktisk kan klare det hele selv: Bedre service til gæsterne og ressourcer frigjort som kan bruges til mere spændende ting end administration. For selv om vi alle, gerne vil levere “verdens bedste værtskab”, så ønsker flere og flere gæster at have fleksibiliteten til at kunne klare det hele selv. At selvbetjening samtidig kan være med til at skabe ekstra omsætning/indtjening udenfor sæsonen, er vel også værd at tage med.

Da vi, i al beskedenhed, kender vigtigheden af et fleksibelt system der kan tilpasses den enkelte virksomhed, er fleksibilitet fra starten tænkt ind i systemet, og vi har endnu ikke mødt en opgave vi ikke kunne løfte. 

Lyder det som om vi rammer plet, med vores løsning, eller er du i tvivl! Vi tager gerne imod en udfordring. Giv os et ring på 7060 5170, eller smid os en besked, så giver vi meget gerne en demo, og et uforpligtende bud på en løsning til din virksomhed.

Name: Vedanta Analytics LLC
Description:
Vedic Wisdom Meets AI Innovation in Analytics

Vedanta - The term "Vedanta" means "the conclusion of the Vedas," encompassing the ideas that emerged from the Upanishads, focusing on either devotion or knowledge and liberation. (Veda means knowledge or learning, and "anta" means ending or conclusion.) The Upanishads are the essence of the Vedas, comprising the knowledge part of the Vedic texts. They are also referred to as Vedanta, since they constitute the final section of the Vedas. The word "Veda" implies learning, so the term Vedanta can also describe the totality of all knowledge. A person who has read, comprehended, and internalized the Vedas has attained their objective. There are four Vedas in total: the Rig Veda, Yajur Veda, Sama Veda, and Atharva Veda. These four Vedas are comprised of four sections: Samhita, Brahmanas, Aranyakas, and Upanishads - the conclusion of knowledge in the Vedas. The last part of the Vedas is called the Upanishads, which are the essence of the Vedas. The Sanskrit term Upanishad originally meant "sitting near a teacher," from "upa" meaning "by" and "ni-ṣhad" meaning "sit down," referring to the student sitting down near the teacher while receiving spiritual knowledge. There are 108 main Upanishads (summaries from the four Vedas) that were orally taught or discussed with the students of the Vedas. The breakdown of the number of Upanishads from each Veda is as follows: Rig Veda (10), Sama Veda (16), Yajur Veda (51), and Atharva Veda (31)

It is generally known that there are problems face both Courts and Court Users. First, there are several inconsistency in judgments between deferent judges this includes the rationale a set of reasons or a logical basis for a particular reasoning. The acceptance of different application of the law may impact on the justice based on different judges. Furthermore, the inefficiency of time and backlogs provide certain challenge. Moreover, human errors and some bias effect justice significantly. Secondly, there are challenges facing Court Users like Clients and Lawyers.  the time and cost to clients are not the only challenges but also length of trial and applications leads to even higher costs and blockage for lawyers also. Thus, there is a great need to overcome these challenges. 
The endeavor will address serious court and counsel’s backlog problems  and lack of public access to legal counsel by creating innovative solution to lawyering. Smart e-judge 2.0 for judicial phase helps to enhance both in consistency in drafting judgemnts and efficiency of justice and reducing backlog. The endeavor will also build a repository of data, machine learning, which increases accuracy as more data is input. As a result, this endeavor will reduce both the risk of human error and reliance on clerks, attorneys, to assist in judgment-writing. Smart e-judge 3.0 for council’s phase makes lawyers’ drafting of pleas and court documents and pleadings more efficient, thereby reducing time and costs for Court Users. It also builds a repository of data and machine learning.
