CAPSA is a digital building passport data platform 

A digital building passport is a database in which all relevant data is held by the building owner in a digital and processable format. The passport combines modules for data collection during site visits, artificial intelligence data matching, and energy infrastructure data to generate a holistic and detailed data picture of a building with minimal time investment. By adding more information during maintenance visits and thanks to the semantic logic engines, which update the data with each entry of comparable buildings, your knowledge about your building is constantly growing. CAPSA evolved from research projects at leading European universities and we continue to implement state of the art innovation and technology.

Talent & Regional Reach: Building skilled workforce pipelines and extending world-class infrastructure to Tier-II and Tier-III cities.

A digital marketing expert online is a professional who specializes in utilizing digital channels and platforms to promote products, services, or brands and to engage with target audiences on the internet. Here are some key aspects of what a digital marketing expert online does:

Strategy Development: Digital marketing experts create comprehensive online marketing strategies tailored to a business's goals and target audience. They decide which digital channels (such as social media, search engines, email marketing, etc.) to focus on and how to leverage them effectively.

Content Creation: Content is a vital part of digital marketing. Experts produce various types of content, including blog posts, social media updates, videos, infographics, and more, to engage and inform their target audience.

Search Engine Optimization (SEO): Digital marketing experts work on optimizing websites and content to improve their visibility on search engines like Google. This involves keyword research, on-page optimization, link building, and other techniques to improve search engine rankings.

Social Media Marketing: They manage and execute social media campaigns across platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, LinkedIn, etc., to build brand presence, interact with customers, and drive traffic to websites.

Pay-Per-Click (PPC) Advertising: Experts create and manage online advertising campaigns, often using platforms like Google Ads or social media advertising, to target specific demographics and drive traffic to websites or landing pages.

Notre entreprise offre une gamme complète de services de suivi évaluation, de redevabilité et d'apprentissage pour les organisations humanitaires et de développement. Nous proposons également des services d'analyse de données et de formation sur l'utilisation des logiciels de collecte, de traitement d'analyse, visualisation de données, conception d'application.
Notre équipe de professionnels expérimentés travaille en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour concevoir et mettre en œuvre des systèmes de suivi-évaluation qui permettent de mesurer l'impact des programmes et des projets, d'assurer la qualité des données collectées, de renforcer la redevabilité et de favoriser l'apprentissage. Nous sommes également spécialisés dans l'analyse des données, y compris les techniques d'analyse statistique et la modélisation prédictive, pour aider nos clients à comprendre les résultats de leurs programmes et à prendre des décisions éclairées.
En plus de nos services de suivi-évaluation et d'analyse de données, nous proposons également des formations sur l'utilisation des logiciels de collecte, de traitement et d'analyse de données les plus courants. Nos formations sont adaptées aux besoins de nos clients et comprennent des sessions pratiques sur l'utilisation des logiciels de collecte de données (comme KoboToolbox, SurveyCTO, Open Data Kit) et des logiciels d'analyse et de visualisation de de données (comme SPSS, Excel, Power BI). Nous sommes également en mesure de concevoir des formations sur mesure pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients.
L’entreprise propose est la production de films pour les ONG. Nous croyons que les films sont un outil puissant pour sensibiliser le public à une cause, pour inspirer l'action et pour documenter les réalisations et les défis d'une organisation. Nous avons une équipe de professionnels de la production de films qui peuvent travailler avec les ONG pour produire des films sur leurs projets, leurs réalisations et leurs impacts.

Name: Incybit
Description:
Incybit is a next-generation lossless compression platform built for real-world data flows — from cloud and enterprise pipelines to desktop workloads. Our technology reduces storage by up to 76%, helping organizations cut costs, extend capacity, and accelerate data movement without compromise.

Why teams choose Incybit:
*Shrink storage footprints by 30–76%.
*Lower cloud bills and speed up transfers and backups.
*Deploy instantly — no code changes, drop-in with existing buckets.
*Billing only when you save.

What makes Incybit different:
*Producer-aware pattern dictionaries trained on real files.
*Optimized for data-center throughput and steady workloads.
*Transparent decompression — your tools always see the original bytes.
*Broad format support: PDF, Office, Parquet, and more.
*Also a fast, general-purpose file compressor, outperforming familiar tools on DOCX and PDF.

At Incybit, we’re redefining how businesses manage and move data — helping teams do more with less, without changing the way they work.

Name: GUS Connector Free Automate and Verify Polish Company Data in Salesforce

GUS (Polish Central Statistical Office) is the main government institution responsible for collecting, analyzing, and publishing statistical data on Poland’s economy, population, and business landscape.

The REGON register maintained by GUS contains official and up-to-date records of all active companies in Poland, making it a trusted source of business information.

By integrating data directly from GUS, the GUS Connector enables real-time company verification in Salesforce using NIP and REGON numbers, along with current business status.

The GUS Connector leverages publicly available data from the Polish Central Statistical Office to keep your Salesforce records accurate, compliant, and always up to date.

Name: Flight API
Description:
FlightAPI is a flight data API provider that offers real-time access to flight prices, status, and airport schedules. 

Here's a quick overview of the core APIs offered by FlightAPI:

  Flight Price API

FlightAPI offers specialised endpoints for different trip types:

One-Way Trip API: Retrieve real-time prices from multiple airlines and vendors for a single-leg journey. Customize searches using parameters like departure and arrival IATA codes, travel dates, passenger count, cabin class, currency, and region.


Round Trip API: Access pricing data for round-trip itineraries by specifying departure and return dates, along with other relevant parameters.


Multi-City Trip API: Plan complex itineraries involving multiple legs (up to five). Define each segment with specific departure and arrival airports, dates, and passenger details to obtain comprehensive pricing information.


 Flight Status API

Monitor global flights with real-time updates on departures, arrivals, delays, terminal/gate info, and live status. Supports both commercial and private aircraft. Data is sourced directly from airlines and airport authorities, ensuring accuracy with every request. 


 Airport Schedule API

Access detailed airport schedules, including arrivals and departures from two days before three days ahead. Each response includes flight numbers, airline details, aircraft codes, terminal/gate info, and airport metadata like IATA/ICAO codes, coordinates, timezone, and elevation.

ADDIS
ADDIS har funnits i Sverige sedan mitten av 1980 – talet, är ett helt digitaliserat, genomforskat, diagnostiskt system, med snabba, säkra, differentialdiagnostiska bedömningar av människors förhållande till alkohol, narkotika, läkemedel, med screeningmoduler för PTSD, depression, ångest och spel, inventering av upplevda aktuella stressituationer, matrelaterade problem, samt undersökning av eventuellt existerande ärftlig sårbarhet (hereditet) för utveckling av beroendeproblem.

GAMES 
GAMES, som är det enda diagnosverktyget för spel om pengar i Sverige, operationaliserar, precis som ADDIS, de diagnostiska kriterierna från ICD och DSM systemen (spelberoende/hazardspelsyndrom) och, erbjuder ett konkret sätt för utredaren att bli inbjuden till den värld som människor med allvarliga substansrelationer befolkar.

SUGAR
SUGAR är ett strukturerat diagnostiskt instrument som kartlägger och undersöker patienters/klienters relation till socker/mjöl och processad mat.

Una particolare attenzione su Corigliano Rossano e dell'alto Jonio, quale transito naturale e punto di accesso ai paesi del Mediterraneo, con l’opportunità di una crescita “comune”. Name: GeoCogent
Description:
We deliver high-resolution geophysical data, AI-powered interpretation, and soil digital twins to developers, engineers, and construction firms seeking to reduce uncertainty and build with confidence. Our mission is to modernize subsurface intelligence through automated geophysics, machine learning, and data-driven engineering workflows.

Our Data-as-a-service (DaaS) platform integrates multi-modal geophysical acquisition—GPR, seismic, electrical, magnetic, hyperspectral drone scanning, and geological field data—into a unified, structured data repository. With proprietary ML and deep learning pipelines (including CNNs, SVMs, and Random Forests), we automate classification, anomaly detection, feature extraction, and digital twin generation. This dramatically reduces manual interpretation time and accelerates early-stage decision-making.

We support clients across Canada—from Winnipeg and the Prairies to Alberta and nationwide—through rapid field deployment and scalable data processing. Our Geophysical DaaS model shortens assessment timelines, lowers geotechnical investigation costs, and enhances safety and predictability in construction planning.

Beyond regional operations, our vision is global. We aim to collaborate with data-driven companies, research institutions, and infrastructure developers to build a worldwide subsurface intelligence network. By combining advanced geophysics with AI, we create a pathway for smarter, faster, and more resilient infrastructure development across diverse markets.

Name: NiCE Tech Group Limited
Description:
Today the world is dependent on computers for every element of life, business, transport, utilities, government and finance.  All depend on ‘Networked Communications’ which is the route for 95% of all Malware and Hacker activity of which Ransomware is the front runner.
In 2000 Ransomware cost world organisations $6b, last year this rose to $20b making it the world’s highest crime revenue earner, exceeding this planet entire drug trade.
The ‘Computer Network’. Is defined as every activity that sits outside of the Data Centre or Cloud and includes the communication infrastructure, the attached laptop or PC and the User.  
For a Computer Network to be fully secure it has to guarantee that only the authorised user can access the system, that the data traffic cannot be infiltrated and is 100% encrypted and the entire Network is immune to malware and attack from hackers.
The NiCE Security System uniquely achieves these criteria in a package that is both easy to use and is rapid in the creation of the network connection.  Unlike other so called network security systems that depend exclusively on software to provide a solution which is venerable to hacker infiltration the NiCE Security System uses a unique combination of hardware and firmware to create a secure foundation for the application software to reside.

Name: Enterprise Permission Manager
Description:
Enterprise Permission Manager for MSSQL

EPM is an Enterprise Permission Management system which looks at MSSQL server permissions in a entirely new approach.  This new approach allows you to quickly view, compare, analyze, manage and script permissions at any level of your enterprise.  Instead of searching through SSMS in the vast amount of areas and objects, everything is just a right click away.

Today, managing SQL Server permissions can be a complex, extensive, and time consuming process. Roles and permissions are embedded in all levels of the Enterprise, from the Servers down to the objects within databases. Just trying to answer a simple question about permissions one user has on the enterprise can take hours if you are using SSMS. There is no central place to view or manage them because permissions are stored in multiple levels. 

EPM solves the problem of identifying permissions and managing them.  A simple right click and "View Permissions" shows all permissions for a User, Role, Database, Login, Server, or even the entire enterprise. Export these lists easily to Excel for review with your teams and management.  EPM also helps you manage your SDLC Environments by using the "Compare Permissions" feature to easily sync all permissions or pick and choose what permissions you want to sync. 

The Database Administrator's job of managing enterprise permissions is revolutionized with EPM! Get started now and unlock the power of this application in your enterprise.

C - Criar….

U - Utilizar….

Nós utilizamos as metodologias ativas de aprendizagem, onde colocamos nossos alunos como o protagonista do seu próprio processo de aprendizagem e assim, fazendo com que ele possa estar preparado para o mundo corporativo, tornado-se um profissional diferenciado…

What sets us apart:

• Live traffic updates with precise junction-specific information
• Comprehensive coverage of accidents, roadworks, and planned closures
• Clear indication of affected directions and lanes
• Estimated delay times and anticipated clearance information
• Mobile-friendly platform for checking updates while on the move

We source our data from official channels and trusted partners to ensure maximum accuracy, publishing updates immediately as situations develop. Our straightforward, information-first approach prioritizes what drivers need most – clear details on where issues are occurring, how long they'll last, and the best alternatives when available.

Whether you rely on the M25 for daily commuting, logistics operations, or occasional travel around Greater London, our service helps you make informed decisions, reduce journey stress, and improve travel predictability.

Name: NoveltyGraph
Description:
At NoveltyGraph we help organisations reduce carbon emissions from their websites by making user generated emissions visible, measurable and reportable. 

Each visit to a website emits carbon in form of power used on the server in the data center, by the end users device and by the network connecting them. An estimated 60% of power consumption can be attributed to the end user device, and with billions of daily page views across the internet and an estimated 1,372 tWh per year ITC footprint, lowering emissions from users by just a fraction of a percent yields countless watt hours of electricity saved each year.

We are dedicated to providing the best and most accurate tooling for collecting emissions data from usage of websites and making it actionable throughout your organisation in order for you to make the informed decisions required in order to lower your organisations footprint.

First step is to make it measurable.

Name: Softkrat Consultancy Services LLP
Description:
Welcome to Softkrat – Your Business Intelligence Partner!

We are passionate about data and can be your partner in achieving your organization’s data intelligence goals. If your decisions are based on a “gut feel” and have tonnes of data lying idle (whether in databases, excel, CSVs, Cloud, etc.), look no further; we can bring your data to life with our all-round offerings.

Our multi-skilled and multi-layered approach turns the “raw” data into actionable insights by processing, grooming, and transforming data spread across disparate systems. 

Formed in 2023, our diverse skillsets span from providing Azure Cloud-based solutions, MS Power Platform, Tableau, MS Office Automation (Excel and Access databases), and other digital marketing solutions such as WordPress-based websites to SEO, SEM, and other data solutions.

Core Competencies

Microsoft Power Platform: Dive into our end-to-end solutions based on Power BI, custom Power Apps, and Power Automate-based solutions.

Cloud and Prem SQL Server solutions: from data discovery, and data modelling to database migration 

Data Integrations via low code-to-code intensive complex ETL solutions based on Azure Data Factory (ADF), SQL Server Integration Services (SSIS), Spark, and Scala-based streaming solutions.

Data Visualization & Insights: With tools like Power BI and Tableau, we transform complex data into strategic, actionable, and visually appealing insights. 

Master Data Management: We can strategize the MDM strategy for your organization helping create a trusted view of business-critical data that can be managed and shared across the business to promote accurate reporting, reduce data errors, remove redundancy, and help workers make better-informed business decisions.

Platform Upgrade or Migration: Migrate on-prem data to the cloud such as SQL Server to Azure SQL. We can also migrate data from one platform to another without losing the data precision, such as migration of MS Access data to SQL Server.

Name: FUSION FOR PREDICTIONS LTD
Description:
Fusion for Predictions Ltd is well-positioned for sustainable growth as a specialised AI and data consultancy, capitalising on opportunities in digital transformation, analytics, and governance. The company's future success will be determined by its ability to leverage expertise in artificial intelligence, metadata, and predictive insights to expand strategic partnerships and scale service offerings.

Current Position
•	This private limited company, established in 2014 and headquartered in Ipswich, UK, is presently registered as active.
•	Its primary areas of expertise include information technology consultancy, with specializations in data strategy and architecture/engineering, data management and governance, advanced data analytics and insight, as well as artificial intelligence services.
•	The company is led by Shree Ganesh Keith Ragoonaden, who possesses extensive experience in advanced analytics and data methodologies and practices.

Future Outlook
•	With the growing demand for predictive analytics and machine learning, Fusion for Predictions Ltd is well-positioned to serve as a trusted advisor to organizations seeking actionable insights.
•	As regulatory scrutiny of data privacy and governance intensifies, the company’s deep expertise in metadata management and data quality frameworks will be increasingly valuable.
•	There are significant opportunities to broaden the company’s portfolio beyond IT consultancy, particularly into the education, healthcare, and financial services sectors, where predictive modeling and digital transformation are pivotal.
•	Establishing partnerships with universities, research institutions, and enterprise clients will enhance the firm's credibility and unlock new revenue opportunities.
•	As ESG reporting becomes integral to corporate strategy, the application of predictive analytics can enable organizations to forecast risks and opportunities, thereby creating a distinct advisory niche.
